programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Amazon: One Jungle, Many Worlds
programme.desc: The Amazon is the largest rainforest in the world, and the richest ecosystem on earth. This film uncovers what makes the Amazon such a powerhouse of evolution; how it has come to home a third of all species on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Patagonia is a place of extremes  of vast ice fields and snow-capped mountains; of windswept deserts, and violent oceans. Survival here means being tough enough to cope with brutal winters, and canny enough to exploit brief seasons of plenty.
programme.sub-title: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado
programme.desc: Venezuela is famous for its lost worlds, its forbidding mountains, huge swamps, and impenetrable jungles, all seemingly cut off in space and time. Yet each is linked, by the mighty river: the Orinoco, the rumoured route to El Dorado, city of gold.
programme.sub-title: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Pantanal: Brazil's Wild Heart
programme.desc: Every year the Pantanal is drowned by immense floods, and then suffer severe drought. Yet, while people struggle, the Pantanal hosts some of the greatest gatherings of animals on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: The Andes: World in the Clouds
programme.desc: The longest chain of mountains in the world, the Andes run the length of western South America and dictate the climate for the whole continent. They include some of the highest peaks outside the Himalayas.
programme.sub-title: The Andes: World in the Clouds

programme.title: Wildest India: Thar Desert: Sacred Sands
programme.desc: Covering 200,000 km sq, India's Thar desert is one of the harshest places on Earth. Desiccating winds and near permanent drought has earned this unforgiving land another name: the region of death.

programme.title: Wildest India: Ganges: River of Life
programme.desc: Then watch, the longest river in India, The Ganges. It's a lifeline to wild animals, from rhinoceros and river dolphins to otters and gharials.

programme.title: Wildest India: The Himalayas: Surviving the Summits
programme.desc: The Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India. he Himalayas' rugged highlands offer little direct refuge to humans, in the shadow below, over a billion people in India rely on the mountains for survival.

programme.title: Wildest India: Western Ghats: Monsoon Mountains
programme.desc: See how the Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India.The Himalayas' highlands offer little direct refuge to humans. /Then, learn about the western Ghats. A spine of mountains that lay claim to being one of the most bio-diverse places in the world.

programme.title: Wildest India: India's Lost World
programme.desc: North-east India is an anthropological paradise; there is no other place on Earth with so many different ethnic groups. The forest are filled with mysterious tribes whose lives are dictated by the rain and the seasonal fruits of the forest.

programme.title: Wildest India: Thar Desert: Sacred Sands
programme.desc: Covering 200,000 km sq, India's Thar desert is one of the harshest places on Earth. Desiccating winds and near permanent drought has earned this unforgiving land another name: the region of death.

programme.title: Wildest India: Ganges: River of Life
programme.desc: Then watch, the longest river in India, The Ganges. It's a lifeline to wild animals, from rhinoceros and river dolphins to otters and gharials.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Wolf Boy
programme.desc: Starring Chloë Sevigny and Eve Hewson. In the vein of Little Miss Sunshine, with a modern day fairy-tale surrealism that fans of Tim Burton will love.

programme.title: Felicia's Journey
programme.desc: A young woman leaves Ireland to find her boyfriend in England, and while there is helped by a man hiding unsettling secrets.

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: Mad Money
programme.desc: Deep inside the most secure bank in America, three desperate women from very different worlds cook up the most unlikely heist of the century: Smuggle out millions of dollars in worn-out currency headed for a Federal Reserve shredder every day.

programme.title: Left Behind
programme.desc: A small group of survivors are left behind after millions of people suddenly vanish and the world is plunged into chaos and destruction.

programme.title: Knucklehead
programme.desc: After incurring a large debt with a local criminal ringleader, Eddie Sullivan creates a get-rich-quick scheme and enlists a gentle giant named Walter as his unwitting accomplice.

programme.title: Timeline: Timeline
programme.desc: Based on the Michael Crichton novel. TIMELINE tells the story of a professor who inadvertently catapults himself back to 14th-century France, in the middle of the 100 Years War.

programme.title: Misconduct
programme.desc: An ambitious lawyer is caught between a corrupt pharmaceutical executive and his firm's senior partner. When the case turns deadly, he must find the truth or lose everything.

programme.title: A Bronx Tale
programme.desc: A father becomes worried when a local gangster befriends his son in the Bronx in the 1960s.

programme.title: Code Name: Diamond Head
programme.desc: Counterintelligence takes on new meaning in this barely coherent tale of Hawaiian espionage that takes place on movie sets meant to look like Hawaii.

programme.title: King Dinosaur
programme.desc: In King Dinosaur, the crew pokes fun as scientists are terrorized by snakes, bugs, and dinosaurs on a newly discovered planet.

programme.title: Last Of The Wild Horses
programme.desc: A cowboy winds up in the middle of a turf war between a rancher and his neighbors in Last of the Wild Horses.

programme.title: MST3K: Werewolf
programme.desc: After digging up strange bones, a man becomes a werewolf.

programme.title: The Beast of Yucca Flats
programme.desc: After a devastating atomic test, Joseph Javorsky, a defecting Russian scientist, is transformed into a murderous radioactive beast.

programme.title: Hercules And The Captive Women
programme.desc: Hercules and the Captive Women: Hercules tries to save his son from an evil queen.

programme.title: Hercules Unchained
programme.desc: While trying to resolve a quarrel between warring brothers Eteocles and Polynices, Hercules is taken captive by Queen Omphale of Lydia. Can he escape from the royal court and rescue the woman he loves, before it’s too late?

programme.title: Secret Agent Super Dragon
programme.desc: A secret agent tries to stop a drug lord from taking over the world with hallucinogenic chewing gum.

programme.title: Swamp Diamonds
programme.desc: An undercover police woman infiltrates a group of hardened female criminals who plan to break out of prison and retrieve diamonds from a swamp.

programme.title: Danger Death Ray
programme.desc: Danger Death Ray: A slick secret agent investigates an evil organization that stole a top secret death ray.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 54
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can mind control be achieved? Can a room be painted with dynamite?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 85
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is there any way to prevent a bloodhound from tracking one's scent? Is it possible to get past a guard dog? Can an old dog be taught new tricks?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 96
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is it possible to climb a building with a motorized grappling hook? Will getting punched by someone wearing a ring leave a ring-shaped imprint?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 157
programme.desc: Is there any way to prevent a bloodhound from tracking one's scent? Is it possible to fool a dog trained to sniff out contraband?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 139
programme.desc: Does a car explode when driven off a cliff? Can a huge rocket launch a cage holding a human, and would the person survive?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 195
programme.desc: Can you survive a 35-foot fall while covered in bubble wrap? Can a rocket-powered ejector seat flip an upside-down car back onto its wheels, as seen in "Die Another Day"?

programme.title: Mythbusters Revealed Special
programme.desc: The fans are in for a treat with this special episode which opens the archives to the best of the show’s bad takes, flubs and flops, many of which have never been screened before.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 130
programme.desc: Could a human hang on to the roof of a speeding car? Can dental floss be used to cut through the steel bars of a prison?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 188
programme.desc: Are men better at driving than women? Are women better at reading facial emotions than men? Are men better at grilling than women? Are men better at following maps than women?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 115
programme.desc: Is it possible to lift a car using fire hoses? Do goats faint when scared? Can a person create a huge fireball with sawdust and a flare?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 39
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a tissue box in the back of a car kill the driver if the car crashes? Is it possible to split an arrow by hitting it with another?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 101
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is shooting fish in a barrel really as easy as the proverb says? What is the most effective cure for pain caused by hot chili peppers? Are elephants really afraid of mice?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 194
programme.desc: Can a bullet ricochet off pavement and up through a car's floorboard, as seen in "Burn Notice"? Can you ride an explosion's shock wave to jump farther than you can under your own power?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 94
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a baseball be hit hard enough to remove its covering? Does sliding into a base get a person there faster? Can balls be hit further with a corked bat?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 222
programme.desc: Can moonshine explode and destroy the shack it is hidden in? Can a car fueled by moonshine run as well as one running on gasoline?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 120
programme.desc: What household objects are bulletproof? Once buried alive inside a coffin, is it possible to punch your way through the coffin and dig yourself out?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 29
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a person escape from prison using salsa? Can hardened cement be removed from a cement truck using explosives?

programme.title: Fear Factor: Helicopter Climb/Blender of Fear/Pole Hopper
programme.desc: Climb a rope ladder into a helicopter. Eat the blended concoction you are given. Move flags from the first to the last pole.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Vertical Gauntlet/Rat Hat/Semi-Truck Rope Walk
programme.desc: To run through a vertical obstacle course. Contestants will put their head inside the box with 24 rats. To cross a plank suspend between to speeding semi-trucks.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Window Walk/Coffin of Creatures/Submerged Cage Escape
programme.desc: Celebrity 2. To move flags from one open window across and around the outside of a building. To separate and move white snakes out of a group of green. To escape from a submerged cage and swim to a life ring.
programme.sub-title: Window Walk/Coffin of Creatures/Submerged Cage Escape

programme.title: Fear Factor: Bridge Hang/Uterus Skee-Ball/Cable Plate Walk
programme.desc: To hang from a bridge. To eat Pig Uterus in the allotted time. To walk on suspended plates.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tunnel Swim/Eat Balut/Bicycle Plank
programme.desc: Contestants enter the water where there is a 30-yard long tunnel, then eat unhatched duck embryo in the form of the street food balut. Contestants must also ride a bicycle across a 10" wide plank that is suspended between two buildings.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Helicopter Box Jump/Tarantula Pit/Water Tube
programme.desc: Jump from a moving helicopter onto a floating platform. Place 60 pink-toed tarantulas into a torture hat and stay still for 3 minutes. Lie down in a tube as water is pumped in. Are you scared yet?

programme.title: Fear Factor: Public Nudity/Madagascar Roaches/Chain Submerge
programme.desc: To stand naked in public. Contestants have to eat 0-5 live Madagascar hissing cockroaches. Players are wrapped in heavy chain around their ankles and submerged into a tank of water.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Sky Surfing/Billiards/Container Ship
programme.desc: Gathering as many flags as possible. Playing a game of pool to eat bizarre items. These stunts and more are the challenges contestants face in this episode.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Inverted Fire Hang/Harrier Jet
programme.desc: To unlock the Fear Factor straight-jacket the quickest. To gather the most flags the fastest.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Alligators/Fear Factor Buffet/Runaway Tanker Truck
programme.desc: Would you be brave enough to swim with alligators and face the Fear Factor buffet? Players must also make their way through the inside of a runaway tanker truck to retrieve a key and unlock the box.

programme.title: Fear Factor: A Bigfoot Car Crush, Snake Tank, Floor Drop
programme.desc: Everyone knows Bigfoot, an enormous truck that crushes everything in its path. Can the contestants outrun it? Contestants must also descend into 10-foot high tank filled with water and ribbon snakes.
programme.sub-title: A Bigfoot Car Crush, Snake Tank, Floor Drop

programme.title: Fear Factor: A Triple Beam Walk, Glasswalking, Magnetic Car Plunge
programme.desc: Three steel girders are attached to a crane, 100 feet off the ground. A contestant walks on broken glass. A car is held up by an electromagnetic crane.
programme.sub-title: A Triple Beam Walk, Glasswalking, Magnetic Car Plunge

programme.title: Fear Factor: A Counter Balance Beam, Weenie Roast, Swinging Rope Bridge
programme.desc: Our contestants will have to negotiate 70-ton crane with a seesaw. Contestants eat cooked deer, elk, beef or water buffalo penis. Our contestants will try to walk across a series of swings.
programme.sub-title: A Counter Balance Beam, Weenie Roast, Swinging Rope Bridge

programme.title: Fear Factor: A Traverse The Dam, Bee Headed, Water Coffin
programme.desc: The Big Tujunga Dam towers hundreds of feet high. Contestant's head and shoulders will be covered in bees. The contestants will lie in a small Plexiglas coffin which has holes drilled in the bottom and on the sides.
programme.sub-title: A Traverse The Dam, Bee Headed, Water Coffin

programme.title: Fear Factor: A Stage Coach Net Drag, Cod Stew, Pipe To Pipe To Pipe Walk
programme.desc: A cargo net is draped off the back of a stage coach. Contestants take turns playing street hockey goalie as a hockey puck machine shoots pucks at them. Three wet pipes are suspended by cranes 90 feet up in the air.
programme.sub-title: A Stage Coach Net Drag, Cod Stew, Pipe To Pipe To Pipe Walk

programme.title: Fear Factor: A Speed Boat To Helicopter Ladder, Worm Transfer, Car Through Building
programme.desc: Contestants must exit from a speed boat by grabbing onto a ladder that is hanging out of a helicopter. A contestant has to transfer mealworms from a Plexiglas container to a scale. Contestants must launch themselves in a car off a 3 foot high ramp.
programme.sub-title: A Speed Boat To Helicopter Ladder, Worm Transfer, Car Through Building

programme.title: Fear Factor: A Burning Building, Scorpian Pit, Rotating Climbing Wall
programme.desc: Contestants will climb up 4 stories on a hook and ladder with 70 pounds of gear. A contestant must lay in a pit for 2 minutes while scorpions are dropped on them. Contestants will be put on a platform suspended from a crane 100 feet in the air.
programme.sub-title: A Burning Building, Scorpian Pit, Rotating Climbing Wall

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Hack Attack
programme.desc: Blue Angel swoops in from the blue to save Playmaker from two AIs designed to destroy!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Blue’s Back!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Dueling for Answers

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: The Lost Incident

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: A Piece of the Puzzle

programme.desc: Ai updates Roboppi’s processors on the who, what, where, and why of LINK VRAINS!

programme.desc: Duelists are mysteriously being logged into LINK VRAINS against their will, and it’s up to Yusaku to find out why!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Suture the Circuit
programme.desc: Blue Angel takes on the mastermind who developed the virus that deletes duelists!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: The Brave Battler
programme.desc: With LINK VRAINS under attack, it’s up to the flashiest duelist ever to save the day – Shima!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Bugging Out

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Showdown in the Sewers

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: The Tower of Hanoi
programme.desc: The Hanoi’s greatest weapon is about to be unleashed unless Yusaku can link into the VRAINS and stop it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Once Upon A Time

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Roots of Evil
programme.desc: Spectre knows Blue Angel's entire life story, and he’s going to give it a sad ending!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: The Hollow
programme.desc: Playmaker must cut down Spectre’s defenses if he is to topple the Tower of Hanoi!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: A Bridge Too Far
programme.desc: Spectre stoops to a new low when he reveals a game changer that leaves Playmaker without a play to make!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Out on a Limb
programme.desc: The duel between Playmaker and Spectre comes to a crashing conclusion as the bridge they’re battling on begins to break apart!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Ring the Bell

programme.desc: Making a comeback is what Gore does best, but will his finisher be enough to vanquish Varis?

programme.desc: Playmaker makes a final stand against Varis to save LINK VRAINS!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Storm Access

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: The Reveal

programme.desc: The Tower of Hanoi is nearly complete – leaving Varis a win away from deleting LINK VRAINS once and for all!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Link to the Future

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: On Your Mark, Get Set, DUEL!
programme.desc: Hoping to save his friends from the clutches of Sector Security, Yusei Fudo challenges his old nemesis Officer Trudge to a Turbo Duel!
programme.sub-title: On Your Mark, Get Set, DUEL!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Creepy Crawlies
programme.desc: With his Duel Runner on the line, Yusei finds himself dueling against a bully who battles with a deck full of bugs.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: Looking to get his Stardust Dragon card back from Jack Atlas, Yusei takes off in a race against time and Sector Security.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Blast from the Past, Part 1
programme.desc: After making it through to New Domino City, Yusei confronts his old friend Jack Atlas and challenges him to a Turbo Duel.
programme.sub-title: A Blast from the Past, Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Blast from the Past, Part 2
programme.desc: As the clash between Jack and Yusei comes to a climatic close, a mysterious creature appears as their two Dragons duke it out.
programme.sub-title: A Blast from the Past, Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Facility, Part 1
programme.desc: After being sent to The Facility, Yusei befriends an odd old man who duels with a treasure deck full of ancient mystic cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Facility, Part 2
programme.desc: Yusei duels the top dog at The Facility using Yanagi's treasure deck. Meanwhile, Jack learns about the mystery surrounding his Mark of the Crimson Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Fire It Up!
programme.desc: With Yusei still serving out his sentence at The Facility, Jack finds himself having to face off against former Turbo Duel Champion Hunter Pace in a rematch that could send Jack's career up in smoke.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Lockdown Duel, Part 1
programme.desc: After being sent to the Maximum Security Zone in The Facility, Yusei risks being permanently placed in lockdown when he decides to duel Chief Armstrong in order to win a pardon for his pal.

programme.title: The Steal
programme.desc: When villainous London bankers plunder desperately-needed money from the Third World, a female computer hacker is hired to get it back. A tale of kidnapping, computer fraud and Morris Minors.

programme.title: Struck By Lightning
programme.desc: Carson Phillips is put in charge of publishing a school paper, but his fellow students aren't so keen to help. When he discovers a lot of the popular kids are keeping secrets, he decides to blackmail them in to helping him - what could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: How to Murder a Millionaire
programme.desc: Spoiled Beverly Hills housewife Irma Summers is convinced that her husband plans to kill her. She escapes from her mansion with an enterprising con-woman, and the pair soon finds themselves up to their elbows in action, intrigue, and misadventures.

programme.title: Sweet Talker
programme.desc: A sweet-talking con man (Bryan Brown) starts to turn his life around when he falls in love in this family-oriented comedy.

programme.title: Let Go
programme.desc: Featuring the king of comedy Kevin Hart, this hilarious, unconventional and heartfelt journey is all about love, loss and other felonies! Discontent parole officer Walter is struggling with the humdrums of married life.

programme.title: You May Not Kiss the Bride
programme.desc: Bryan is a quiet, photographer but when he falls foul of local gangsters, he is forced to marry the boss's daughter, Masha, in order for her to get her green card. They are sent to a remote tropical island for a honeymoon that is far from idyllic.

programme.title: Mortdecai
programme.desc: Depp, Paltrow, and McGregor star in this globe-trotting comedy about an unlikely team recruited to find a stolen, priceless painting.

programme.title: Killing Dad
programme.desc: One of the all-time great British black comedies! A man goes looking for his long lost dad – only to meet a voracious older woman who is, apparently, the sex bomb of Southend.

programme.title: Super
programme.desc: After his wife falls under the influence of a drug dealer, an everyday guy transforms himself into Crimson Bolt, a superhero with the best intentions, but lacking in heroic skills.

programme.title: Ghost World
programme.desc: The story of neo-cool Enid and Rebecca who, faced with graduation from high school take a hard look at the world they wryly observe. When Rebecca focuses her attention on mutual romantic fixation Josh, the girls friendship is forever changed.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunted Theme Park - Part 1
programme.desc: What could be haunting an abandoned theme park in Lancashire? Ghost Dimension seek out paranormal activity in Camelot and they are in for a ride!

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunted Theme Park - Part 2
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension continue investigating Camelot Theme Park, the UK's most haunted and come face to face, with a powerful paranormal entity.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Barn
programme.desc: Something Strange is haunting the remains of a colliery in Cheshire and Ghost Dimension head in to uncover the truth behind the activity!

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Evil Spirit in the Cave
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension face a dark sinister ghost inside haunted Caves. Crank caves based in St Helens are said to be the most haunted in the area. Strange paranormal spirits spooky anyone that ventures inside.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Ghost in the Shower
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Waterloo Rugby Club and come into contact with a very mischievous spirit in the male showers! A ghost that scares away any female that dares to enter.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Streets
programme.desc: Hidden underground for years in Keighley West Yorkshire. Ghost Dimension investigate haunted Victorian Streets, used during the war as bombing shelters.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Crooked House
programme.desc: Deep in Cheshire Ghost Dimension explore a house full of ghostly activity and paranormal goings on. Used to house troops during WW2 as a medical unit.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Secret Nuclear Bunker
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Hack Green Secret Nuclear Bunker in Nantwich. Something sinister and paranormal seems to be causing havoc inside of the building and tonight it unleashes powerful activity

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Stranger in the Blitz
programme.desc: Damaged during the blitz, the location the team investigate was a former war hospital for the injured and wounded, based in Liverpool, UK.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Prisoner of War
programme.desc: Barrow Green H17 Anti-Aircraft Battery build to protect the Liverpool Docks and general area and a former prisoner of war camp, holds some sinister secrets and Ghost Dimension uncover paranormal activity dating back to WW2. What will be caught tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Ammo Store Explosion
programme.desc: Simonswood Supply Depot was one of the main ammunition depots in Lancashire, England during World War II. Located at Simonswood, it was used as an ammunition depot delivered by ROF Kirkby.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Washed Away Air Raid
programme.desc: This abandoned World War Two air raid shelter holds paranormal secrets that haunt anyone that ventures inside. A ghostly entity makes contacts they team uncover the whats behind the hauntings.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Buried inside the Bombing Decoy
programme.desc: A Second World War bombing decoy site at Formby. It was commissioned in December 1940 as a 'Permanent Starfish' site to deflect enemy bombing from the city of Liverpool and it is now home to a whole host of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: WW2 Hospital Haunting
programme.desc: Built in the early 1900’s and now used as offices, a former world war hospital has become the new home for something supernatural. Strange voices, eerie footsteps and the sounds of painful screams have all been reported. What will be uncovered tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Fort Crosby
programme.desc: Crosby Battery, also known as Crosby Point Battery and Fort Crosby, was an artillery battery situated between Crosby and Hightown in Lancashire, United Kingdom. The battery was used for port defence and anti-aircraft defence during WWII.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Gwrych Castle: Supernatural Gateway
programme.desc: Bex and Sean explore Gwrych Castle in Wales, renowned for its hauntings. Amid eerie voices, strange noises, and shadows, they use specialized equipment to unveil the spectral mysteries lurking within. Will they unearth Gwrych Castle's ghostly secrets?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Gwrych Castle: Secrets of the Unknown
programme.desc: In the thrilling conclusion, Bex and Sean return to Gwrych Castle for intense paranormal investigations. Eerie chambers, mysterious apparitions, and chilling whispers await as they seek conclusive otherworldly proof.
programme.sub-title: Gwrych Castle: Secrets of the Unknown

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Phantoms of Formby: Starfish Bunker Unveiled
programme.desc: Join "Ghost Dimension" at Merseyside's Formby Starfish Bunker. Unveil its wartime secrets, encountering eerie whispers, phantom footsteps, and soldier apparitions. Can they capture undeniable proof of the paranormal?
programme.sub-title: Phantoms of Formby: Starfish Bunker Unveiled

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Who is There?
programme.desc: Could a cemetery be haunted? The team come head out to find out and contact restless souls that have been haunting the graveyard.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander visit a house on the outskirts of Manchester.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 17

programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit an old building in Wales needing some life restoring into it, a property in Margate, and a flat in Battersea with plenty of room for improvement.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a flat in Surrey, a house in Derbyshire and a house in Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view properties in Margate, Harrogate and London.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view a semi in South Hampton, a house in Folkstone and a little terraced house in Sutton.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 28
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin visit a Grade II listed farmhouse in Derbyshire, a split level flat with a split level personality in Holloway and a rather smelly property in Plymouth.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view properties in Harrogate, Kent and Stoke.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander visit properties in Devon, Norwich and Ramsgate.

programme.title: The Shape of Things to Come
programme.desc: Sometime in the future, man has set up colonies on the Moon, when Earth becomes uninhabitable. A madman decides to destroy the Moon colonies with his robots and automated ships, and only three people and their robot can stop him.

programme.title: Shock
programme.desc: A psychologically distraught woman is committed to a private sanitarium by the man she witnessed commit a murder.

programme.title: D.O.A.
programme.desc: Frank Bigelow, told he's been poisoned and has only a few days to live, tries to find out who killed him and why.

programme.title: Perfect People
programme.desc: After many years of marriage, Ken and Barbara decide to radically change their way of living. In order to become more attractive, they submit themselves to modern diets, exercise, and plastic surgery.

programme.title: Androcles And The Lion
programme.desc: Based on George Bernard Shaw's Roman satire about a Christian tailor's fortuitous friendship with a wild lion.

programme.title: Summer of Fear
programme.desc: A teenage girl's life is turned upside down after her cousin moves into her house, and as time goes by she begins to suspect that she may be a practitioner of witchcraft.

programme.title: The House That Dripped Blood
programme.desc: Robert Bloch, the author of Psycho, presents a quartet of terrifying tales. (1971)

programme.title: Perfect People
programme.desc: After many years of marriage, Ken and Barbara decide to radically change their way of living. In order to become more attractive, they submit themselves to modern diets, exercise, and plastic surgery.

programme.title: The Honorary Consul
programme.desc: Based on the novel by Graham Greene, this star-packed drama follows a doctor working in a South American clinic as he becomes caught up in a plot to kidnap the US Ambassador.

programme.title: White Fire
programme.desc: Bo and Inga, brother and sister jewel thieves, target the legendary 'White Fire' diamond...

programme.title: Hunter: Silver Bullet
programme.desc: The only clue in a series of murders is a trail of police-issued ammunition that leads Hunter and McCall to suspect a colleague as the killer.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: A boy is the only witness to the shooting of his parents. As McCall attempts to unravel the circumstances surrounding the murders, Hunter must get the boy to talk about the shocking incident.

programme.title: Hunter: The Baby Game
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall enter the world of baby brokering when the murdered body of a call girl and an unharmed two-year-old are left in front of the woman's television set.

programme.title: Hunter: Presumed Guilty
programme.desc: McCall finds her loyalties sharply divided when an important murder case being prosecuted by the Assistant District Attorney, with whom she is in love, is jeopardized by Hunter.

programme.title: Hunter: Dead on Target - Part 1
programme.desc: While investigating the apparent suicide of Hunter's friend from the Vietnam War, the pair uncovers a 20-year-old betrayal that is still killing people today.

programme.title: Hunter: Dead on Target - Part 2
programme.desc: While investigating the apparent suicide of Hunter's friend from his days in Vietnam, the pair uncovers a 20-year-old betrayal that is still killing people today.

programme.title: Hunter: No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
programme.desc: Mysterious tape recordings accusing a company of illegally dumping toxic waste seem like a prank until Hunter and McCall find that someone is willing to kill to conceal the truth.
programme.sub-title: No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished

programme.title: Hunter: Honorable Profession
programme.desc: When Hunter confronts the police department to defend the actions of a Chinese-American policewoman critically wounded in the line of duty, the pair heads to Chinatown.

programme.title: Hunter: Payback
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall try to solve a bank robbery and murder while coping with the double and triple-crossing schemes of a criminal who once saved Hunter's life.

programme.title: Hunter: Partners
programme.desc: When the husband of a policewoman is murdered, evidence of wife abuse makes Hunter and McCall suspect the woman's patrol partner who knew about the beatings.

programme.title: Hunter: The Pit
programme.desc: A veteran police dispatcher is blackmailed into undermining Hunter's and McCall's investigation of a multimillion-dollar gold robbery when her son is kidnapped.

programme.title: Hunter: City Under Siege - Part 1
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall track a pair of killers through a Los Angeles suburb where a crime wave and backlash vigilantism threaten to tear the community apart.

programme.title: Hunter: City Under Siege - Part 2
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall track a pair of killers through a Los Angeles suburb where a crime wave and backlash vigilantism threaten to tear the community apart.

programme.title: Hunter: City Under Siege - Part 3
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall track a pair of killers through a Los Angeles suburb where a crime wave and backlash vigilantism threaten to tear the community apart.

programme.title: Hunter: Me, Myself & Die
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall learn that a bizarre murder is a biochemist's effort to conceal the killing of a woman's husband in order to win her.

programme.title: Hunter: Informant
programme.desc: Hunter refuses to reveal an informant to a Grand Jury and is sent to jail, as a convicted murderer stalks the only witness against him -- Hunter's informant.

programme.title: Hunter: Bloodline
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall follow a trail of revenge and fraud while investigating the murder of a thoroughbred racehorse.

programme.title: Hunter: Shoot to Kill
programme.desc: As Hunter and McCall investigate a string of jewelry store robberies, they pursue the thieves in an alley and McCall shoots a man who may be innocent.

programme.title: Hunter: Code 3
programme.desc: McCall can't believe that a doctor, a pregnant trauma specialist who once treated her, began drinking again and killed herself by driving off a cliff.

programme.title: Euronews
programme.desc: Euronews offers a unique perspective on world events. It empowers people to make up their own mind by delivering factual analysis and a diversity of viewpoints. Because all views matter, Euronews is "All Views".

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: "Fifth Gear" newcomer Ben Collins attempts to drive a 700 bhp drag racing beast.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny tests the latest Jeep Wrangler to see how it stacks up against the original WWII model; Tim Shaw tackles the car tax; Jason Plato goes behind the wheel of the new Aston Martin V8 Vantage.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim gives some advice on how to prevent car theft. Tom meets up for some mayhem in a Fiat Qubo with a touring Guns 'n' Roses tribute band.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny attempts to make a profit by buying a scrap car and selling its parts at an auto parts sale; Tiff goes behind the wheel of the Aston Martin DBS.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford tests the new Grande Punto Abarth; Tim Shaw investigates whether it's possible to save huge amounts of money by going back to basics and servicing your own car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff and Jason compete in a quad bike race; Vicki tests the new Alfa Romeo Mito.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim puts a variety of car polishes to the extreme test to simulate a year of abuse.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford test drives the new Ford Fiesta; Vicki and Tiff are aided by renowned trainer Simon Pavey in a motorcycle race.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim takes the driving test again to see if the test really is getting harder or not.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff and Jason race each other in monster trucks. Tim finds out if super diesel produces more horsepower than standard diesel. Vicki challenges 17-year-old Tom Cave to a bit of rally racing.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff and Jason battle it out on the track in go-karts; Tom Ford tests the Renault Laguna; actor Dick Benedict joins Jonny Smith in a luxury road test.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this packed episode of "Fifth Gear," Tom Ford delivers a verdict on the new Volkswagen Scirocco, Vicki heads to the track to test out Porsches and Tiff tests out the world's first underwater car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford conducts a shocking crash test that could prove to be essential viewing for family motorists; Tim hits the road with the latest camera alerting systems.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford performs the only televised test of the Dodge Challenger; Jonny Smith heads to the Ultimate Street Car show at Santa Pod to judge the "Show & Shine" competition.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In the season finale, "Fifth Gear" visits the Firecracker Banger, an event where even rare classic cars get a glorious, fiery send-off.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim reveals the best way for motorists to wash their cars; Jason pits three gold-medalist sailors against one another in a track race.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny Smith tests the VW Passat CC vs. the Mercedes CLS; Jonny Smith becomes an ice cream man for the day to test out the newly revamped Citroen Berlingo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny looks into budget convertibles, which go for even lower prices during the winter.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato joins Britain's best downhill skier, Chemmy Alcott, to drive a Group N rally car; Tom Ford drives the Citroen C5 in Lisbon; Tiff takes a look at the latest Subaru Impreza.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato finds out how fast cricketer Shane Warne is on a track. Jonny Smith and Tom Ford compare diesel and petrol Minis, and Tiff compares the new Subaru Impreza to a previous version.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this edition of "Fifth Gear," Vicki Butler-Henderson pits the brand new Audi S5 against the BMW 335i. Then, England rugby star Kyran Bracken is given some circuit driving tuition from Jason Plato.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim heads to London to investigate the new craze of car share clubs; Jason Plato meets up with celebrity chef James Martin, whose enviable car collection includes a busted Formula One.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell drives the Lamborghini Gallardo Superleggera; DJ Christian O'Connell is challenged to a stunt driving routine.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Iwan Thomas accepts a stunt challenge from world-famous precision driver Russ Swift.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim Shaw visits Pit Start, a fully-stocked repair shop with a twist — there are no mechanics.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell and Jason Plato test two roadsters on the track; Tom Ford tests the sexy new Maserati GranTurismo coupe.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Car nut Tim Shaw joins the team to tackle ways to spend less money on fuel; Tom tests Ford's new Kuga SUV; Jonny sees if a car is actually worth more as scrap than as a functional vehicle.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford visits billionaire Bernie Ecclestone's sprawling garage to explore his rare collection before he auctions off more than 50 of these unique models.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny Smith hunts down three cars that fall within budget for parents on their first year of motoring.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Olympic rowing gold medalist Matthew Pinsent tests sports cars. Tim tries to discover if manufacturers' economy claims transfer to the real world.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom and Jonny enter the grueling Exeter Trial, a 24-hour off-road driving event that has been held for 100 years, in an old Volkswagen Beetle.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff gets to drive the Aston Martin DBS, the latest James Bond car; Jonny Smith embarks on a 600-mile transcontinental trip to test out the world's first diesel Grand Tourer.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim investigates the government's new scrappage system that promises cash in exchange for bangers; Tiff and Jason race a pair of double-decker buses.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim Shaw takes Renault to task for overcharging customers; Tiff runs a shootout between two coupes; Vicki spends a day with Formula One star Lewis Hamilton.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A lovely lady with an innocent smile, kind eyes, a charming personality? No one would suspect a woman like that would murder. These women don’t look or behave like killers.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Love can be beautiful, love can be blind and love can be deadly. Desire and jealousy are powerful forces driving women to dark and horrifying places in their minds.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Greed is one of the oldest motives for murder, and these deadly women are no exception: they’ll do anything to satisfy their need for cash. This is the dangerous world of the fortune hunters.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Married to Murder
programme.desc: To the outside world, their marriages seemed happy. But behind closed doors, there was no domestic bliss. These women wanted out, but getting a divorce wasn’t their preferred option.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hearts of Stone
programme.desc: Deadly Women are not always the ones you expect. They are not the strangers lurking in the dark, they are a young mother, a supportive wife and a grandmother - all killers. Behind their loving masquerade lies a wake of family horror and pain.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Under His Control
programme.desc: These are love stories with bleak, bloody endings. Blinded by desire, obsessed and malleable, some women fall into lethal relationships with dangerous, controlling men.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The heaviest judgments of convicted killers are reserved for those who committed premeditated murder. These women plot and plan. They know the consequences of their actions, but still they go forward to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While their sisters chose a life of sensible, suburban motherhood, these deadly women chose a life of crime. They lived with the thrills, the danger and the deadly consequences of being outlaws.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Behind their friendly smiles, deadly women hide histories of bloodshed and murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession
programme.desc: Deciphering what causes minds to corkscrew out of control is the complex work of the criminal profiler. Obsessions can take many forms: beauty, devotion, ego and power.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Behind lace-curtained windows and beneath sensible haircuts lurked evil. Appearances were deceptive. We did not notice these female killers walking by. These women wore a mask of sanity.

programme.title: Deadly Women: A Daughter's Revenge
programme.desc: Every day, teenage girls are being scolded by their parents, only to respond with tears and slammed bedroom doors. Some daughters won’t take "no" for an answer, and these girls become deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Twisted Thrills
programme.desc: The intimate thoughts of a twisted mind would be enough to stun a community and horrify the world. But thoughts alone may not be enough to turn someone into a killer. This is a bizarre journey into the world of women who kill for twisted thrills.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Anger, fear and despair are basic human emotions. But when these emotions are coupled with a broken mind, a perfect storm is created. Teetering on the edge of unbalance, these women resort to murder when pushed to the breaking point.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dishonored
programme.desc: Shirley Russell was determined enough to reach the rank of Captain in the United States Marine Corps. When this officer turned up missing, her colleagues refused to believe she had gone AWOL. It was unclear whether Captain Shirley Russell was alive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Melissa Brannen: Missing
programme.desc: In 1989, residents of a close-knit apartment community in Virginia gathered for a holiday celebration. For Tammy Brannen and five-year-old daughter Melissa, Christmas was always a special time. Then, without warning, the little girl was gone.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Global Pursuit
programme.desc: In Langley, Virginia, a terrorist fired into rush hour traffic. The victims seemed randomly selected, but the motive appeared to be political, targeting employees of the Central Intelligence Agency.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Stranger in Town
programme.desc: She appeared on the highway in the spring, a young woman, her life cut short, her past and her identity a mystery. Only by finding out who she was could we ever hope to find her killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Mission
programme.desc: When a family was murdered in Arkansas, it seemed like an isolated event. But soon the crime was revealed to be part of an ever-widening circle of violence that defined a new age of domestic terrorism.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killer Abroad
programme.desc: Beginning in 1990, Europe found itself in the clutches of a serial killer. He became an international outlaw, hopping from country to country to evade capture and to kill again.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Model Killer
programme.desc: It's a model's job to rivet the public's attention. But in 1984, some aspiring models began attracting publicity in a terrible new way.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The True Story of Mississippi Burning
programme.desc: Philadelphia, Mississippi, 1964. A sleepy southern town steeped in tradition finds itself targeted for invasion.
programme.sub-title: The True Story of Mississippi Burning

programme.title: The FBI Files: Human Prey
programme.desc: Thomas Dillon killed five outdoorsmen at random over a period of three years in rural southern Ohio. After a tip led the FBI to the murder weapon, ballistic testing made a match.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Game
programme.desc: In the 1970's and 80s, people went to Alaska looking for a fresh start, to reinvent themselves, or to disappear for a while. Some of those disappearances weren't by choice.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Crime Spree
programme.desc: They swept through six states like a plague, thrill killers acting without rhyme or reason. They targeted adults and young girls, kidnapping, and murdering. And in their rampage, they left plenty of clues, but moving targets are the hardest to hit.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Millionaire Murder
programme.desc: A businessman went to Florida to make one last deal before he retired-he never returned home to his millions. Authorities examined who was closest to him and who stood to gain from his disappearance. But this time conventional rules didn't apply.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a tragic murder led agents into the frightening world of domestic terrorism. Law enforcement vowed to dismantle the violent faction that claimed responsibility.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Takeover
programme.desc: Two armed bank robbers hit a Seattle bank taking over 150,000 dollars. Before they can escape police confront them and the pair splits up. As authorities search block by block they learn one was a career criminal with a long history of violence.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Paradise
programme.desc: It should have been Shangri-La, but when bad blood developed, piracy took over and the only law was the law of the jungle.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Trail
programme.desc: The disappearance of young women triggered a search that spanned the Pacific Northwest. A massive media campaign failed to locate the drifter, who first charmed then killed them. As investigators followed his trail, he always stayed one step ahead.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Any Old Port!
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie have a streak of back luck after their instruments get smashed.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Sons Of The Desert
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie's wives find out they've been tricked into believing they're on a medical cruise.

programme.title: You're Darn Tootin'
programme.desc: Members of a municipal band, Stanley and Oliver seem to be always following someone else's lead, rather than that of the temperamental conductor.

programme.title: The Little Rascals: Best of Our Gang: Best of Our Gang: Night-n-Gales
programme.desc: Spanky, Alfalfa, Buckwheat, Stymie, Porky and all The Little Rascals are at their hilarious best! These are the best episodes from the Golden Era of Hal Roach's Rascals 1930 to 1938 - and they are beautifully restored and presented in vibrant color!

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Perfect Day
programme.desc: Perfect Day is a 1929 short comedy film starring Laurel and Hardy.

programme.title: The Champion
programme.desc: Charlie finds a "good luck" horseshoe just as he passes a training camp advertising for a boxing partner. Charlie puts the horseshoe in his glove and wins, so the trainer prepares Charlie to fight the world champion.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Berth Marks
programme.desc: Stanley and Oliver stumble into the wrong sleeping compartment on the train to Pottsville.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Another Fine Mess
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie hide in a mansion to escape from a policeman.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Below Zero
programme.desc: In need of money, Ollie signs Stan up for a prize fight against an old nemesis.

programme.title: The Little Rascals: Best of Our Gang: Best of Our Gang: Shiver My Timbers
programme.desc: Spanky, Alfalfa, Buckwheat, Stymie, Porky and all The Little Rascals are at their hilarious best! These are the best episodes from the Golden Era of Hal Roach's Rascals 1930 to 1938 - and they are beautifully restored and presented in vibrant color!
programme.sub-title: Best of Our Gang: Shiver My Timbers

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Blotto
programme.desc: Stan must lie to his wife to go out with Ollie.

programme.title: The Little Rascals: Best of Our Gang: Best of Our Gang: Follies of 1938

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: JFK
programme.desc: Richard meets with some prominent JFK assassination researchers to discuss the November 1963 murder of President John F. Kennedy.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Water Engine
programme.desc: Did the late Stanley Meyer figure out a way to run an internal combustion engine on pure water? And was he murdered because of the threat his invention posed to Big Oil?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: The legend of the werewolf throughout history and in various cultures is explored. The Conspiracy Show travels to England and rural Wisconsin to investigate claims of actual werewolf sightings.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Philadelphia Experiment
programme.desc: Richard investigates a legendary naval military experiment said to have been carried out at the Philadelphia Naval Shipyard in October 1943.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Agenda 21
programme.desc: Is Agenda 21 simply a non-binding, voluntarily implemented action plan of the United Nations with regard to sustainable development?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Fluoride
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show investigates the safety and efficacy of putting fluoride in our water supply. Dentists say that putting fluoride in the water supply prevents tooth decay, but some researchers claim it's a toxic substance that causes cancer.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets the owners of an abnormal humanoid skull allegedly discovered in Mexico in the 1930s and a researcher who has had the skull subjected to numerous tests including carbon-14 dating, and DNA in order to determine it’s origin.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Was Presidential hopeful, Robert F. Kennedy really killed by disgruntled Palestinian Sirhan Sirhan as we’ve been led to believe? Or was he another in a long line of Manchurian candidates, a victim of a long standing mind control program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Manchurian Candidates
programme.desc: Several prominent researchers in the field provide a short history of Mind Control experimentation beginning with the Nazis through to the CIA's infamous MK Ultra program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Mystery of Oak Island
programme.desc: Richard investigates Canada's best-known mysteries, the Oak Island treasure. Also known as the money pit, the site has become one of the world's deepest and most costly archaeological digs.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Does the Bible contain hidden messages encoded within certain passages of the Old Testament? Is the prophetic nature of these 'codes' proof the Bible's author is of supernatural or extraterrestrial origin?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Energy Healing
programme.desc: Several energy healers claim they are able to produce spontaneous miraculous healing through a laying on of hands. Claims of similar such healing by a man in a remote village in Brazil, known as John of God are also examined.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Fake Arab Spring?
programme.desc: Who was really behind a series of revolts, protests, and uprisings that swept the Middle East starting in late 2010?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard witnesses a municipal employee in Toronto, Canada undergo a regression during which he re-experiences a previous life as a doctor in early 20 century England.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard travels to England to investigate Britain's Roswell, also known as the Woodbridge-Bentwaters UFO incident, considered by many to be one of the best documented UFO cases on record

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Murder of Marilyn Monroe
programme.desc: Did this pop icon and blond bombshell succumb to a drug overdose in 1962 as we've been led to believe or was she killed for 'knowing too much?"

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the founders of Architects and Engineers for 911 Truth and Firefighters for 911 Truth who present their case that the WTC towers were brought down by controlled demolition on 9/11.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: The religious practice known as exorcism is examined as well as claims of demonic possession. Richard travels to a Catholic seminary in Yonkers, New York.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Pterodactyls
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several explorers and cryptozoologists who believe pterodactyls, flying dinosaurs thought to have become extinct some 60 million years ago, are alive and thriving in remote places such as Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: For centuries, farmers have been discovering strange, complex geometric patterns comprised of rings, circles and other intricate shapes in their fields.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Assassination of John Lennon
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show travels to New York, LA and Toronto in order to investigate the murder of John Lennon. Several researchers posit that Lennon's supposed killer Mark David Chapman was either a patsy or a mind-controlled assassin.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: What on Earth are they spraying? Richard travels into the field to meet several researchers who present compelling evidence that chemicals or biological agents are being deliberately sprayed into the atmosphere by some shadowy government agency.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Can radiation from electrical appliances, power lines, microwave ovens, and wireless technology such as cell phones, baby monitors, alter our DNA, and cause illnesses?
programme.sub-title: The Dangers of EMF (Electro Magnetic Frequencies)

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Is a powerfully rich cabal with a globalist agenda conspiring to destroy sovereign nations and impose authoritarian rule?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Bigfoot
programme.desc: Two prominent Bigfoot trackers and a cryptozoologist affirm the existence of this shy and elusive creature and relate several close encounters with Sasquatch.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Freemasons
programme.desc: Are the Freemasons a harmless fraternity whose members busy themselves by raising money for children's hospitals or a satanic cult whose tentacles and enslave mankind?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Step out of the darkness"

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Who whistled then?
programme.desc: A haunted market venue with a dark past is investigated by the team. A distressed Dale has to leave a vigil, two team members see a dark shape, and there’s a phantom whistler. But who is put in charge of this investigation?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Stay calm, stay calm!"
programme.desc: A journey south to the county of Suffolk sees the AYH team investigating a building that has had multiple uses in its colourful history. With reports of a playful spirit and possible poltergeist activity, Sara and Jane get the fright of their lives.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Something behind me!
programme.desc: The team are back once again. This episode sees the intrepid team joined by two guest investigators - Kevin Ling and Michael Roberts - as they investigate a reputedly haunted venue bigger than most!

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "The heebie-jeebies!"
programme.desc: The 'Are You Haunted' team head northwest in this episode, and to a venue that counts reports of a mysterious black shape, and phantom screams as just two of the many incidents reported there. What will the team encounter?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Hello? I am here!"
programme.desc: EXCLUSIVE. Sara, Phil, and the rest of the Are You Haunted team travel to North Yorkshire, to investigate a venue for the very first time. Among the incidents here are reports of male and female apparitions, doors opening and closing, and much more.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Creeped out

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: I can't rationlise it!!
programme.desc: In this episode, Phil and Sara get the shock of their lives, Ben braves two lone vigils and Dale is unnerved by unexplained noises. But which venue do the team choose to investigate?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Did you just say something?"
