programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Floyd wants to do the show but Jon’s is the scheduled guest.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Once Upon a Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Mario is trying to write his very own fairy tale. The children help by acting out some of their favorite fairy tales to give Mario some ideas.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Here Kitty, Kitty
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Parade of Bikes
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Baby Brother
programme.desc: Barney reminds Baby Bop and BJ that although babies start out little, they grow fast. Through pretend play, favorite songs and fun games, they learn about the many ways we grow every day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Fountain of Fun
programme.desc: While Barney and the children wait for Mr. Boyd's new fountain to be delivered, they have fun playing in and exploring the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids take imaginary trips to different countries with the magical caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Make Music
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ have fun learning about music, rhythm and musical instruments. Barney introduces many different instruments and BJ dreams of one day becoming a rock 'n roll star. They discover that music gives everyone a happy feelin.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is sad because she lost her pet caterpillar, Monty. Barney and the others try to help her find it./Barney and Baby Bop are thrilled when BJ sets up a bug zoo in the caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Coming on Strong
programme.desc: Exercise is good for everybody and every body! From running to touching toes to jumping jacks to some favorite songs and games, Barney and his friends grow strong while having fun with exercise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Grace’s food drive isn’t going very well until Melanie offers to help. Melanie comes up with the perfect idea to get people to donate – put on a movie premiere in the caboose!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Perfectly Purple Day
programme.desc: When Sarah accidentally spills red paint into the blue paint, a mess turns into a perfectly purple day. The children paint pictures, make purple flowers and plan a purple party for their friend Colleen.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: I'm A Builder
programme.desc: When Baby Bop wonders about the noises she hears, Barney explains that the sounds are from big trucks and machines at a nearby construction site. This inspires BJ to build something himself—a wind-up toy robot.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Big Brother Rusty
programme.desc: Barney's excited to find out that Rusty's family is adopting a new baby girl from China; however, Rusty feels differently. He's not sure if he's going to be a good brother, and he doesn't know much about China.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Moving Along
programme.desc: Barney plays a fun game of "Simon Says" with Baby Bop and BJ in the park. They demonstrate how to move their bodies through dancing and playing games.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Riff find a pirate map, but in order to find the treasure, they have to be able to count. It’s time for a music concert in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Play Games!
programme.desc: It's fun and games with Barney and his friends! BJ's favorite way of getting exercise is by playing sports and games. When Baby Bop is shy about trying new games, Barney and his friends show her how tee-rific trying something new can be.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney reminds Riff and BJ that Christmas is about more than getting gifts. Barney takes Melanie on a trip to the North Pole to deliver her letter in person.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Today is the big dance party in the park. Barney tells Baby Bop the story of “The Princess Without a Song to Sing.”

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Go For A Ride!
programme.desc: Barney and the children have fun playing with and learning about busses and cars.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A game of hide and seek takes a turn when Baby Bop claims that an elephant is hiding in the park!/BJ and Riff engage in a friendly contest to see which of them can find the loudest sound in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is surprised to learn that “The Land of Mother Goose” truly exists. Baby Bop catches Barney, BJ, and Riff wrapping a mysterious present in the caboose, she just can’t wait to see what it is.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Home Sweet Earth
programme.desc: It's Earth Day, a great time for everyone to learn how to help take car of our world, but Ben is wasting paper while BJ isn't too concerned about cutting down a tree to make room for a new playground.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Showtime!
programme.desc: Barney, BJ and the kids spend the day preparing for a performance for their friends in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Rabbits - Listen
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective. But all great detectives need a mystery to solve! One quickly comes his way when an animal nibbles on one of Baby Bop's healthy snacks.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ, Baby Bop and Riff can hardly wait for the petting zoo that is coming to the park. Riff feels terrible when he accidentally wrecks BJ’s beloved scooter.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Day and Night
programme.desc: With a little Barney magic, the children experience the differences between day and night!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let Your Creativity Fly!
programme.desc: After finding Barney's paper airplane in the park and pretending to fly like airplanes themselves, Baby Bop and BJ are inspired to use their imaginations. Baby Bop teaches a special dance and BJ pretends to be Captain Pickles.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bunches of Boxes!
programme.desc: A day of imaginative play and fun for Barney and his young friends is kicked off by the arrival of a variety of boxes from the "Enjoy-Your-Toys Company." Surprisingly, every box is empty!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Sweeter Than Candy
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ are helping the park kids get ready for a school play. When Barney tells everyone that putting on shows began in Greece, they want to go visit! While there, they meet some friends and decide to put on a play in an amphitheatre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: It’s Barney’s birthday, and there are surprises around every corner. Baby Bop is practicing her marching because she will be joining a real marching rhythm band and is having trouble keeping a beat.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Splish! Splash!
programme.desc: A "too hot" afternoon becomes a "totally cool" day when Barney introduces his friends to the wonders of water.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ice, Ice, Baby
programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Knuckle Dust
programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hula Moola
programme.desc: Ton and Allen jet to the Hawaiian islands where they're joined by a feisty new female assistant! The team uncovers a pair of James Bond-style gadgets designed for high-speed underwater travel and a vintage sled.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Jersey Score
programme.desc: Ton & Allen attend a silent auction in NJ, but that doesn't stop the local buyers from letting them know they're not welcome! They uncover a skeet throwing machine from the 1960's & a vintage vehicle with some real horsepower!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chi-Town Showdown
programme.desc: Metal Victorian-era burial casket; 1870s glass fire extinguisher grenades; a mechanical 1896 handcrafted Chicago fire station alarm box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hidden Hot Wheels
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Mutual Combat
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade's recovery gets even rockier when tensions rise between Sean and her parents. Ashley and Bar make a tough wedding decision as he faces another court date. (S10, ep28)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Bonded for Life
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade plans to fly home, but Briana tries to convince her to come back to Orlando instead. Kail reveals heartbreaking challenges around a recent medical diagnosis. (S10, ep29)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Cut Out
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade recovers at Briana's house, but has to make a decision about her family. Kail juggles three different co-parenting relationships. (S10, ep30)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: On The Shoulders Of Giants
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Ashley and Bar grapple racist backlash. Kloie's behaviour wedges a divide between Jade and Sean. Leah meets her doctor in hopes of getting answers about a lump. (S10, ep31)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Backslide
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade's career is moving forward, but her relationship with Sean begins to slip. While Ashley prepares to receive her degree, Bar's schoolwork hits a road block. (S10, ep32)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Off The Leash
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Kail faces a court battle with Chris. Bar's DUI resurfaces and threatens to ruin Ashley's graduation party. Leah finds out if she needs surgery on her tumour. (S10, ep33)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Reunion Part 1
programme.desc: Chelsea, Leah, Kail, Briana, and Jade sit down to unpack this season. Chelsea reveals to the other mums why she is leaving the show while Leah's ex-husbands address their contentious relationship.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Reunion Part 2
programme.desc: Dr. Drew and Nessa host as Briana returns after her blowup with Devoin and Kailyn speaks about her personal growth. Chelsea and Cole get emotional as they look back at Chelsea's incredible journey.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Briana's Family Secret
programme.desc: When Briana DeJesus finds out she has a secret teenage brother, her world is turned upside down. Will Briana be able to create a bond with her brother or will her family implode in the process?

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Reunion Part 1
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Leah and Kail reflect on their growth over the last ten years while Jade and Briana discuss their traumatic experience in Miami. (S10, ep34)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Reunion Part 2
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Leah and her daughters discuss their journey. Jade makes boundaries with her mum. Ashley and Bar break down how they overcome struggles and Tea gushes about Holly. (S10, ep35)

programme.title: Teen Mom: Taking It Slow
programme.desc: Maci confronts her ex about child support; Amber makes a choice; Catelynn and Tyler consider living together; and Farrah considers a big change.

programme.title: Teen Mom: To Be With You
programme.desc: Amber and Gary move in together; Tyler's family questions his decision; Maci considers letting her boyfriend move in; Farrah struggles with the separation.

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Last Straw
programme.desc: Amber learns she is being investigated; Ryan wants to meet Maci's new boyfriend; Sophia's grandmother is suing for visitation rights; Tyler's father gets out of jail.

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Sassi tries to stay calm on a romantic getaway. Amber gives Ste the cold shoulder. Sleep-deprived Chloe questions if getting a puppy was a good idea. Shannon resits her GCSEs. (S4, ep3)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: This Girl Can
programme.desc: Sassi is a woman on a mission as she starts her new job. Shannon heads to the seaside where Charlie's wandering eye threatens to derail their family holiday. Ste lays his heart on the line. (S4, ep4)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: A New Normal
programme.desc: Sassi moves into her dream home with Darren, Amber meets a new man, Chloe and Jordan try to freshen up their relationship, while a stressed out Shannon is desperate for time on her own. (S4, ep5)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Shannon and Charlie come to blows in Spain while Amber's flying high in Benidorm. Sassi is missing home, and Chloe's relationship reaches breaking point. (S4, ep6)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Leap Of Faith
programme.desc: Jordan gives Chloe the birthday surprise of her life! Shannon and Charlie decide to split. Sassi connects to her faith and gets a lot off her chest. Amber's birthday ends in tears. (S4, ep7)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Shock And Surprise
programme.desc: Jordan whisks Chloe away to Paris for a big portion of romance and snails! Shannon thinks she might be pregnant. It's a big day for Sassi, and Amber comes to a decision about Ste. (S4, ep8)

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Savon
programme.desc: Savon had big dreams before falling pregnant with the school's most notorious player, Ely. After being dumped while pregnant she meets a new man, but can she convince him to stick around?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Courtney
programme.desc: Pregnant Courtney has decided to reclaim her abstinence - which leaves her boyfriend Scott feeling frustrated and alone. Will their relationship survive Courtney's born-again virgin stance?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Savannah
programme.desc: Savannah had a difficult upbringing and relied on her boyfriend Stone for support. But after finding out she was pregnant, they soon split! Will they be able to co-parent as friends?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Madisen
programme.desc: Madisen is a 16-year-old living in Arkansas and raised by her single dad Nick. Now that she's got a baby on the way, she's pushing her boyfriend to be at least half the dad her father is.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Rachelle
programme.desc: Rachelle's parents had big dreams for her and when she got pregnant after a month of dating her boyfriend, they were devastated. Being pregnant while getting to know the father can be hard.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Maddie
programme.desc: Maddie and her mum were best friends until Maddie met her boyfriend. Crystal sees him as a bad influence and there's tension between the two. Maddie only wants what's best for her baby.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Camryn
programme.desc: Camryn met Cam when she was 14. His personality often put him at odds with her mum, but after finding out Camryn was pregnant and losing his job due to COVID, he was forced into moving in.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kash
programme.desc: Kash has been with boyfriend Nate for a year but struggles with his immaturity. Kash has to see if Nate can handle these new adult responsibilities or if he's just not ready to get serious.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kali
programme.desc: Kali and Auston were shocked to get pregnant so young. Auston moved in with Kali and while Kali's parents feel they've been forced to take him in, Auston's grandparents just want him home.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Selena
programme.desc: Selena's pregnancy came as a shock to her family, especially as they didn't approve of boyfriend Sean. Selena is forced to choose between her family and the father of her child.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Shelby
programme.desc: Shelby is preparing for the birth of her baby with her ex, who already has a baby with his girlfriend. Shelby is confident she can raise her baby on her own but the future looks uncertain.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kyla
programme.desc: Kyla has always had a complicated relationship with her mum, and things got worse when she fell pregnant. Kyla moved out to live with her aunt, while her boyfriend is living with Kyla's mum.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Abygail
programme.desc: Abygail is a gifted honours student who graduated high school two years early to pursue her bachelor's degree at age 16. So it was a shock to everyone when she found out she was pregnant.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Taylor
programme.desc: When Taylor found out she was expecting a baby with her ex Armani she was devastated. Especially since she and Armani were not even on speaking terms at the time.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Maci
programme.desc: Maci is the classic overachiever and cheerleader. Now that's all set to change as she's pregnant and planning to graduate early and move in with her boyfriend, Ryan.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Farrah
programme.desc: Meet Farrah, a popular high-school cheerleader. As if being pregnant isn't difficult enough, she is facing difficulties with the father of the baby, her friends and her mother.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Amber
programme.desc: In this episode, we follow Amber, who's expecting a baby with her boyfriend Gary. They decide to move in together but it's not always easy for these teen parents.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Ebony
programme.desc: Ebony and Josh both have dreams of joining the Air Force, but that may have to change now that Ebony is pregnant.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Whitney
programme.desc: Not only is 16 year old Whitney pregnant, but so is her mother! Watch her prepare to become both a big sister and a mother.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Catelynn
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler both have very dramatic home lives, and it gets even more complicated when Catelynn falls pregnant. They have some important choices to make, but can they cope?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Life After Labour
programme.desc: In this special episode Dr. Drew Pinsky discusses each girl's episode, issues and challenges and update us on what's going on now. There will also be questions from viewers and the audience.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Manhattanhenge
programme.desc: Mac and the team lose the Compass Killer at the World's Fair site, and they soon discover through the use of astronomy and sunrises that it's only a matter of time before he targets the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Death House
programme.desc: Mummified remains are found in a booby-trapped Manhattan penthouse that has been closed off for more than 80 years, and Mac and Stella race against time to find the people who discovered the body, who are still trapped in the building.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Second Chances
programme.desc: CSI uncovers a plot to collect millions of dollars in life insurance after a reformed homeless man is found dead in an alley.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Criminal Justice
programme.desc: A murder trial is delayed and the suspect is released on bail after Stella discovers that the district attorney in the case tampered with the crime scene for personal gain.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Flag On The Play
programme.desc: When a beautiful star quarterback of the Lingerie Football League is found murdered in the locker room hot tub with traces of lidocaine in her system, the CSIs are called in to find out who wanted her dead.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Formula
programme.desc: The team tries to figure out who rigged a race car to go up in flames and leave its legendary driver in critical condition.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Rest in Peace Marina Garito
programme.desc: Sid rules the death of a woman whose twin brother disappeared 15 years ago a suicide, but Stella is convinced that he is wrong and sets out to prove it.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Redemption
programme.desc: Dr. Hawkes is trapped in a cell block during a security breach orchestrated by a familiar face from CSI's past, and the only person who can help him get to safety is the death row inmate who murdered his sister.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Unusual Suspects
programme.desc: A teen is critically injured after being shot in an alleyway. The victim's younger brother witnessed the crime, but he cannot give an accurate description of the incident and shooter to the police.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Point of View
programme.desc: A murder is connected to suspicious behavior that Mac spies from his apartment while recovering from an injury, and his ex-girlfriend Peyton Driscoll may be connected to the case.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Deep
programme.desc: A sailboat race to Staten Island takes an unexpected tack when one of the boats nearly collides with a dead scuba diving instructor.

programme.title: CSI: New York: You Only Die Once
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a James Bond-esque gang of thieves who use high tech methods to steal personal account information from computers and phones before fleeing the scenes in a customized Batmobile-type car.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Down The Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: A murder victim bears a striking resemblance to a well-known avatar in the online role-playing game Second Life. Mac is forced to enter the game himself to solve the mystery surrounding her death. The assassin (Suspect X) escapes.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Buzzkill
programme.desc: When a supermodel is found dead in a giant martini glass on a Times Square billboard, Stella and Lindsay follow the evidence in search of the party crasher.

programme.title: CSI: New York: One Wedding and a Funeral
programme.desc: Mac, Danny and Hawkes investigates a groom murdered on his wedding day, found stuffed and wrapped like a wedding present. Stella and Lindsay investigate when a jigsaw covered in blood is left on Stella's car.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Child's Play
programme.desc: Flack and Stella investigate a man killed by an exploding cigar. Danny and his neighbor Ruben stumble on a bodega robbery and the boy is killed by a stray bullet. Danny is filled with guilt because he was supposed to be responsible for the child.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Happily Never After
programme.desc: A notorious hotel owner known for her meanness is found dead under an ice sculpture, and the clues to the death of a second woman who fell to her death onto a school bus can be found in the book "Peter Pan."

programme.title: CSI: NY: Flag on the Play
programme.desc: When a beautiful star quarterback of the lingerie league is found murdered in a hot tub, the CSIs are called in to find out who wanted her dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Sanguine Love
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead in Central Park the CSI New York team is lured into the mysterious subculture of vampirism.

programme.title: CSI: NY: The Formula
programme.desc: When a car racing legend dies in a fiery explosion, the CSI New York team of investigators discovers that car tampering is the cause.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Uncertainty Rules
programme.desc: When four victims are found dead in a hotel room and the main suspect turns up wielding an ax, the CSIs try to piece together the details.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Going Under
programme.desc: A biker who falls off a balcony was an undercover A.T.F. agent. The gang he infiltrated may be running "corner-shot" guns designed for urban warfare, and another agent who also infiltrated the group may hold the key to the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Death Pool 100
programme.desc: The murder of a young socialite could be connected to a death pool, an offshore gambling boat, and a counterfeiting ring.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Curse of the Coffin
programme.desc: Wolfe believes that he may have triggered a Santeria curse when he disturbs a miniature coffin at a murder scene.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: High Octane
programme.desc: The investigation into a beheading during a stunt at an automobile "sideshow" could ultimately expose a larger cover-up involving stolen cars and jet fuel.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Darkroom
programme.desc: CSI steps up the search for potential serial killer who may be connected to a professional photographer after it discovers that Natalia's sister may be the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Come As You Are
programme.desc: The death of a Marine recruiter ultimately leads Horatio to open an investigation into the death of a soldier in Iraq. The soldier's brother claims responsibility, but Horatio suspects a cover-up.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: When Natalia's ex is found dead at his home, Horatio must step into the investigation to keep his team safe from an overeager investigator.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: No Man's Land
programme.desc: The robbery of a police truck containing confiscated weapons is connected to a plot to spring Clavo Cruz from prison, and one of the guns stolen in the robbery is used in the shooting of a young boy.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Man Down
programme.desc: While the manhunt for Clavo Cruz continues, Delko fights for his life after the shooting.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Triple Threat
programme.desc: A real estate developer is murdered, and the investigation uncovers a complex web of deceit involving his wife her two identical triplet sisters. But the apparently-murdered developer may have had a surprise of his own.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Rush
programme.desc: An actor is found dead in the trunk of a stunt car, but the investigation reveals that he actually died in his room at a high-profile celebrity rehab facility.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Just Murdered
programme.desc: A far from amicable divorce comes to a bigger crisis when bodies start piling up, and Delko falls afoul of a former nemesis when he misses a payment.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Burned
programme.desc: While investigating a possible arson case, Horatio discovers that Yelina is back in Miami working as a private investigator. Meanwhile, Wolfe's prior relationship with one of the suspects gets him in hot water with his superiors.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Kill Switch
programme.desc: While CSI tries to find out who killed a carjacker, Wolfe is forced to become an adversary as he takes a job as a television crime analyst.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Dangerous Son
programme.desc: A probation officer is shot and killed, and one of the suspects turns out to be Horatio's biological son.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Cyber-Lebrity
programme.desc: An Internet celebrity's boyfriend is killed with a bow and arrow. During the case, Horatio becomes a "cyberlebrity" himself, which puts his life in danger.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Inside Out
programme.desc: Horatio goes on a manhunt to find two criminals who escaped from a prison bus after their arraignment. However, he also learns that his son's life is in danger in prison.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Come As You Are
programme.desc: When a Marine recruiter is murdered, the CSIs must delve into the world of enlisting soldiers and the families they leave behind.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Backstabbers
programme.desc: Sonya Barak is standing trial for aiding in a plot to destroy Miami when her own people try to gun her down. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: When Natalia's ex-husband is murdered, evidence suggests that she killed him. Many people had a motive to kill Nick. Horatio and the CSIs investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Throwing Heat
programme.desc: Det. Frank Tripp's life hangs in the balance when he steps on a land mine while investigating a crime scene. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Snitch
programme.desc: When officers respond to a shooting , they discover the body of a young man they know all to well -- police informant Jimmie Stevenson. it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine who pulled the trigger.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Metal on Metal
programme.desc: A athlete is gunned down just weeks before starting college, leaving family heartbroken and detectives stumped. The man seems an unlikely target, until Lt. Joe Kenda pries into his personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When a tip comes in suggesting foul play on a 71yr old man, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she’s been sold on the black market… or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Sisters
programme.desc: The bullet-ridden bodies of two sisters are found in a suburban house that’s littered with mysterious clues. Joe Kenda learns that the two unassuming young mothers shared an explosive secret.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Worst Fear
programme.desc: Police are shocked to find a 13-year-old boy killed in an explosion, but their grief turns to alarm when they discover a second, unexploded bomb.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Tighten the Screws
programme.desc: When young Iraq War veteran Curtis Ashley ends up dead, Lt. Joe Kenda has to solve the slaying of a seemingly innocent victim using his keen awareness of the criminal mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Rains Down
programme.desc: Restaurant worker Sharon Coleman is murdered in a hail of large caliber gunfire. Kenda must break through a web of lies to hunt down one of the most dangerous criminal masterminds he’s ever faced.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When police find 24-year-old Patrick Ray with a gunshot to the temple, the scene has all the telltale signs of suicide. But Lt. Joe Kenda's instinct says otherwise.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Permanent Frost
programme.desc: On a wintery December evening, a 29 year old mom doesn’t return home. Is she going to miss her daughter’s first Christmas? Her family is devastated when she is found frozen in the snow.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Bitter Blade
programme.desc: When a beautiful home healthcare worker disappears, loved ones lead the search for her safe return. A series of incoming text messages reveal a soul-crushing truth and a murder most evil.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Blood Red Sun
programme.desc: The most violent night in the history of Anchorage, Alaska leaves seven dead – including four teens. The small police department is overwhelmed until clues lead them to the unlikeliest of suspects.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell's ex-wife Margo gets amnesia after an accident and stays with Haskell to recover, only she thinks they're still married. Phil and Stuart spend the night in Holly's place and get to know her intimate sleeping behavior.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Phil and Holly make a pact to ask their bosses for raises, Phil gets fired. Holly tries to help Phil get his job back. Stuart's integrity is tested when he dates a British woman with repulsive teeth.
programme.sub-title: Take This Job and Shove It

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Holly and Eden date two charming French men who shower them with gifts and glamorous living, they wonder if their dream dates are too good to be true. Phil and Haskell train Stuart on how to confront a bully at the bar.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil opens his own agency and enlists Eden as his temporary assistant to help sign his first client. Meanwhile, Holly hires Haskell as her temporary assistant. Stuart pursues the Yelper who smeared his practice's perfect rating.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly dates a much younger man and Eden questions his motives. Phil and Eden secretly become friends with benefits. Stuart convinces Haskell to pursue a woman he's admired from afar and ends up accidentally stealing her cat.
programme.sub-title: The Hand That Rocks the Cradle

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly attends her ex-boyfriend Paul's wedding and throws it into chaos. At the wedding Phil and Eden realize they're developing feelings for each other. Haskell sets his sights on the most desperate woman at the wedding.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Eden shares a secret about herself and Phil with Holly, who blabs to Stuart and Haskell, testing boundaries within the group.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart's sister Nicki (Leah Remini) shows up with some shocking news about her marriage. Phil and Eden consider bringing a guest into the bedroom.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil and Eden's relationship is strained when he is named one of the top ten bachelors in New York City and has to pretend to be single. Stuart dates the twin sister of his evil ex, Sabrina.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Nicki (Leah Remini) returns to start her new life in the city, disrupting Stuart's professional life and Phil's personal life. Haskell and Eden attend an all-nude production of "Twelve Angry Men."

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell hatches a plan to win over Nicki. Stuart and Phil visit Stuart's old home one last time before it is sold.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil unknowingly sleeps with a nun and must keep Nicki from finding out. Haskell and Eden take care of a fussy Holly after she suffers an injury.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly accidentally sets Haskell up with a gay man. Stuart helps Phil get over his fear of funerals.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart asks Nicki to accompany him to an important dinner. Phil and Haskell consider getting vasectomies together.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Heal Thyself
programme.desc: Felix's hypochondria kicks into overdrive when Oscar starts dating the most important person in Felix's life - his doctor. Erinn Hayes guest stars as Sharon.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Secret Agent Man
programme.desc: Felix convinces Oscar to appear on a sports television show against Teddy's advice to stick with radio. NFL Network's Rich Eisen and 'Inside the NBA on TNT's' Kenny Smith guest star as themselves.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Unger Games
programme.desc: When Oscar feels threatened by Felix's surprising performance on the softball field and basketball court, they agree to a decathlon to determine which one of them is the better athlete. Geoff Stults guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Sleeping Dogs Lie
programme.desc: When Oscar and Felix make a trip to Ashley's (Christine Woods) to retrieve Felix's special pillow, a secret that he has kept from Oscar is revealed. Five-time NBA All-Star Chris Webber guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Enlightening Strikes
programme.desc: When Felix substitute teaches a yoga class, his teaching style rubs everyone, including Emily, the wrong way. Weird Al Yankovic and Regis Philbin guest star.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Jealous Island
programme.desc: Oscar becomes obsessed with living up to Murph's (Geoff Stults) standards when he finds out the girl he is seeing used to date the handsome ex-baseball player.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Audit Couple
programme.desc: When the IRS decides to audit Oscar and his ex-wife Gaby, Felix offers to mediate between the contentious exes when he realizes that he might be the reason Oscar was audited in the first place.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: All About Eavesdropping
programme.desc: After Oscar and Felix become obsessed with eavesdropping on their bickering neighbors, they try to subtly intervene and help them save their marriage.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Unger The Influence
programme.desc: With the help of Murph, Oscar decides to throw a big party when Felix finally agrees to spend the weekend away. Also, Felix and Emily have their first sleepover.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: From Here to Maturity
programme.desc: Oscar faces a personal dilemma when he dates a young nanny, Allyson (Brianne Howey) who works for his neighbor, Charlotte (Teri Hatcher).

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Madison & Son
programme.desc: Oscar's dream comes true when he is asked to throw out the first pitch at a New York Mets game.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Oscar's Overture
programme.desc: Oscar attempts to impress Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) by purchasing a table for a fundraiser to benefit The New York Philharmonic.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: An Oscar Named Desire
programme.desc: Oscar and Charlotte hit a speed bump when they hesitate to take their relationship to the next level.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Make Room For Dani
programme.desc: Oscar reluctantly agrees with his agent that it's time to shake things up on his radio show and allows Dani to have a bigger role after a rival host, Rich Eisen, taunts him.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: A Dinner Engagement
programme.desc: Felix attempts to reverse Emily's birthday curse and plans a nice dinner to celebrate with friends.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Chess Nuts
programme.desc: Oscar learns that Felix was a nationally ranked chess player as a child and convinces him to return to the game to make money.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Odd Man Out
programme.desc: Felix forces Oscar and Emily to go on a date to get to know each other better in the hope that they'll become friends.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Road Scholar
programme.desc: In an attempt to surprise Emily, Felix gets his learner's permit and enlists his friends to help him learn how to drive.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: All The Residents' Men
programme.desc: Oscar and Felix run a heated campaign for President of their building's tenants' association, but Oscar doesn't fully realize everything the position entails.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Ex-Factor
programme.desc: When Murph persuades Oscar to try online dating, Oscar finds himself on a blind date with Felix's ex-wife, Ashley (Christine Woods).

programme.title: The Odd Couple: London Calling
programme.desc: Oscar is forced to choose between his romantic plans with Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) and helping to save Felix's relationship as Emily decides to extend her stay in London.

programme.title: The Millers: CON-Troversy
programme.desc: Nathan is assigned to cover a Sci-Fi Fest for his workplace and runs into a famous book author who has hated him since grade school.

programme.title: The Millers: Reunited and It Feels So Bad
programme.desc: Tom and Carol decide to formally end their marriage but are surprised when they both hesitate to finalize the divorce, sending Nathan and Debbie into a panic at the thought of their parents reconciling.
programme.sub-title: Reunited and It Feels So Bad

programme.title: The Millers: Give Metta World Peace a Chance
programme.desc: Nathan lands the biggest interview of his career with professional basketball player Metta World Peace, but when karma catches up with him, he risks ruining his professional reputation.
programme.sub-title: Give Metta World Peace a Chance

programme.title: The Millers: Diggin' Up Bones
programme.desc: In an attempt to get Carol to be more daring, Kip encourages her to confront her old Central Elementary School work nemesis, Miss Pam (Molly Shannon), at the teacher's retirement party.

programme.title: The Millers: You Are the Wind Beneath My Wings, Man
programme.desc: When Ray points out that Nathan has a history of being the worst wingman ever, Nathan embarks on a mission to be a better friend by becoming less self-involved.
programme.sub-title: You Are the Wind Beneath My Wings, Man

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: And Then There Were None
programme.desc: A casino is brutally robbed by four trigger-happy men wearing wigs. Painstaking identification efforts lead to ex-con serial killer Tammy Felton and accomplices, but one by one they are found murdered themselves.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Ellie
programme.desc: The investigation of the death of a petty con man and drug mule leads the CSI team to Brass' daughter Ellie.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Organ Grinder
programme.desc: When businessman Robert Fairmont is found almost dead in a hotel elevator, the CSI team assume the case. They find evidence of heavy metal poisoning. When they look for the corpse, it has been cremated and the organs donated.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: You’ve Got Male
programme.desc: When a young woman riding a horse finds a body of a woman inside a pipe in a construction site, Grissom and his team investigate the murder. Soon they find another woman's body and coroner Dr. Albert 'Al' Robbins notes that the women were sisters.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Finger
programme.desc: Wealthy Roy Logan acts suspiciously when withdrawing $1m cash with blood on his hands, but must be released for lack of a crime. When Catherine rushes after him with his spectacles, she gets a phone call saying Logan's lover Amanda Freeman was kidnapped.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Primum Non Nocere
programme.desc: An ice hockey player dies during a game.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Felonius Monk
programme.desc: Grissom studies Ananda's Vegas Buddhist monastery where four Thai monks were fatally shot in the forehead. Forensics also show the presence of hostile restaurant owner Peter Hutchins Sr. and his son, Pete Jr.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Chasing The Bus
programme.desc: A tour bus heading to Las Vegas skids off the highway, leading to many deaths and even more injuries. The team suspects that this was no mere accident.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Cats In The Cradle
programme.desc: An old lady is found dead with a stab wound in her chest. There are over 20 cats in her house.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Anatomy Of A Lye
programme.desc: Grissom and Sidle investigate the death of someone who was buried in a shallow grave in a park and covered in lye.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Cross-jurisdictions
programme.desc: An ex-CSI chief is murdered in his house after a wild party for the rich and famous. His wife and young daughter are taken hostage in Miami. Catherine and Warrick follow the trail and work with Caine and his team to solve the case

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Hunger Artist
programme.desc: The body of a woman is found in a shopping cart, wrapped in a blanket with her mutilated face protruding out. The woman was a model named Ashley James whose face can be found all over Las Vegas, on billboards and magazine covers.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Revenge Is Best Served Cold
programme.desc: A world-famous poker champion drops dead in the middle of a game. He appears to have had a heart attack. Outside of the city, Nick and Catherine investigate the death of a young street racer.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Accused Is Entitled
programme.desc: Hollywood sex symbol Tom Haviland admits to having sex with a girl who is found dead in his casino hotel bedroom with her throat fatally pierced with a corkscrew. His lawyer demands a near-instant trial, leaving CSI almost no time to work.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Let The Seller Beware
programme.desc: The owners of a house placed on sale are found dead, their bodies discovered by two interested buyers. Sara is working solo on the death of a cheerleader at a high school.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: A Little Murder
programme.desc: A dwarf is found dead, hanged in an auditorium during an annual convention for little people. Working on a case of murder during a home invasion, Catherine is attacked by the perpetrator while processing the scene.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Abra Cadaver
programme.desc: During a magic show, a female participant really disappears during a disappearing act. Nick and Catherine investigates the death of a rock star found on his tour bus with a needle stuck in his arm.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Fight Night
programme.desc: A boxing champ dies in the ring after taking a brutal beating from his nemesis, but Grissom finds evidence that points to murder.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Snuff
programme.desc: Catherine is called in by a pornographic-film developer to view graphic footage from a snuff movie in which a woman is brutally slain.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Blood Lust
programme.desc: A cab driver seems to run over a boy and is then beaten to death by a mob for racial reasons.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: High and Low
programme.desc: Grissom, Warrick, and Nick investigate the case of a man who apparently was murdered and pushed off a six-story building.

programme.desc: An ex-convict gains full control of a mother.

programme.desc: An ex-convict gains full control of a mother.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home
programme.desc: Police find charred human remains in a burn pile at a farmstead while investigating the disappearance of the homeowner and his live-in help.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home
programme.desc: In Aspen, Colo., socialite Nancy Pfister invites Trey and Nancy Styler to rent out her chalet, but the living arrangement ends in a brutal beating death and accusations of murder.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home
programme.desc: After Brian Geddes invites 22-year-old Jordan Shaver to share his home, she decides to start a new life with someone else and Geddes goes missing.

programme.title: Written In Blood
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to Cheshire to investigate the opportunistic crimes that took place at a remote barn house in Congleton.

programme.title: Written In Blood
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to South London to unravel the unbelievable story of Banaz Mahmod, a woman murdered by members of her own family.

programme.title: Written In Blood
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to Liverpool to unravel the notorious murder of James Bulger, who was abducted and killed by two 10-year-old boys.

programme.title: Written In Blood
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to South Yorkshire to explore the bizarre case of a man dubbed 'The Rotherham Shoe Rapist'.

programme.title: Written In Blood
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to Darlington to investigate the case of Pater Chapman, dubbed `The Facebook Killer'.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Citizen Detective
programme.desc: When a college student was found dead in rural Quebec, police refused to call it a murder, but years later, her brother continues his own investigation into her death. On the eve of a trip to return to the scene of the crime, tragedy strikes again.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: An arrogant Bournemouth hotelier called Peter Taylor gets away with murdering his wife in 1982, but when he conspires to kill his son-in-law nine years later, his luck runs out.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: When Danny Dyke tried playing the hardened drug dealer, he found himself in over his head, but it was his murderers that ended up having sleepless nights.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: When Margaret McOnie is found dead on the cliff tops, a nationwide manhunt followed. Her murderer would soon be revealed as a deadly conman and a double murderer.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: When Linda Anders is found dead at home, her wheelchair-bound husband Malcolm claims an intruder broke in. Police findings quickly change the course of the investigation.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Charlotte Pinkney vanished from Ilfracombe after going to a party. Police launched a murder hunt when her handbag was found in undergrowth - would they find the perpetrator?

programme.title: Real Detective: North of the Border
programme.desc: After being promoted to the Homicide Unit, a detective is assigned to a case about a missing woman in Pickering.

programme.title: Real Detective: North of the Border
programme.desc: Mike Eastham is taken across the country and back again in attempts to catch a gunman responsible for one of the largest mass murders in Canadian history.

programme.title: Real Detective: North of the Border
programme.desc: An elderly woman is found brutally murdered in her upper-middle-class home, an apparent victim of a robbery gone wrong. As Lethbridge Police Detective Ryan Stef investigates, he uncovers a web of lies that implicates a shocking suspect.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Into the Mountains (Tibet)
programme.desc: Revealing the work of a secret team of scientists and scholars established by SS leader Heinrich Himmler to scour the globe seeking the origins of the Aryan race and collect ancient artifacts.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Cro Magnon
programme.desc: The debate about humanity's true origins becomes a nefarious fixation as SS leader Heinrich Himmler turns his attention to proving the Paleolithic past of Germany's Aryan race.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Runes
programme.desc: Runes are the letters of an ancient Germanic writing system that harkens back to a mythological age filled with heroes, magic, and mystery.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft: The Lancaster: Britain’s Frontline Bomber
programme.desc: The Avro Lancaster is the legendary British heavy bomber that carved its place in history with Bomber Command during World War 2. That conflict saw over seven thousand of these iconic aircraft come off the production line.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft: The Spitfire: A British Fighter Legend
programme.desc: Unusually, we look at the later, clipped wing version flown by Czech refugee pilots in the UK during WW2. We get close-up with a beautifully restored example, fly her and unearth long unseen test and operational footage.
programme.sub-title: The Spitfire: A British Fighter Legend

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft: ME-109: The Luftwaffe’s Frontline Fighter
programme.desc: The definitive, if not the best, Axis fighter of World War two: we delve into the story of legendary ace Adolf Galland and examine in detail and example of the type in his colours. We also look at the technical heritage the 109 designers left.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft: Boeing B-29: Superfortress
programme.desc: The story of the prolonged development and the initially troubled operational history of the Boeing B-29 Superfortress. Forever known as the airframe that dropped the first atomic weapons on Japan, the B-29 lived on well beyond its war years.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft: HE-111: Germany’s Frontline Bomber
programme.desc: The Heinkel He 111 is one of the most recognised German aircraft of WW2. The broad winged design was a guinea pig for future bombers, with more variants than any other military aircraft of the time.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft: The Mosquito: The Wooden Wonder
programme.desc: We trace the astonishing story of designers turning away from metal and back to wood to create a twin-engine bomber that could outrun almost any aircraft in the sky, yet deliver a bomb load greater than an Avro Lancaster.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Sex Life: X-Rated
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler had a depraved sex life that he tried to keep hidden from the German public. He was said to be a chronic masturbator, a voyeur and that he engaged in sado-masochistic sex with women.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Sex Life: Body Image
programme.desc: Hitler wanted the world to believe he possessed super-human qualities but in private he was a wreck. This episode reveals the archives that confirm Hitler’s genital deformity, the alarming truth about his heavy drug addiction and the Parkinson’s.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Sex Life: Family Matters
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler's father was a violent, abusive man. His mother doted on her young son. This episode delves deep into the psychology of Hitler as the narcissistic child who grew into a malignant psychopath full of rage and deep hatred.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Sex Life: Suicidal Maidens
programme.desc: Using extensive archival research, this program explores the squalid secrets he lied and killed to protect

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: German Bomber In Liverpool
programme.desc: Suggs and WWII militaria expert Stephen Taylor unearth artefacts from former military sites - starting with a German bomber found in Liverpool.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: WW1 Special
programme.desc: To mark 100 years since the end of the Great War, Suggs and Stephen excavate the site of a huge World War One transit camp at Morn Hill, outside Winchester.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Douglas Bader and the Duxford Fliers
programme.desc: Suggs and WWII expert Stephen hunt for souvenirs left by flying ace Douglas Bader and the legendary Duxford Fliers.
programme.sub-title: Douglas Bader and the Duxford Fliers

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Hull Blitz
programme.desc: Stephen Taylor and Suggs are up to their knees in mud in Lincolnshire as they dig up the remains of a Bolton Paul Defiant plane, shot down during the Hull Blitz.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Tank in a Vineyard
programme.desc: Suggs and Stephen continue their hunt for buried WWII treasure, and discover a tank buried in a vineyard.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Top Secret Arms Depot
programme.desc: In Weedon Bec, Suggs and Stephen unearth a wealth of WW2 relics as they uncover the very secret past of a top secret arms supply depot.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: 82nd Airborne and German POWs
programme.desc: Suggs and Stephen go in search of relics from the United States' elite 82nd airborne infantry division.
