programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Good to the Last Bite
programme.desc: As the final week of tuna fishing begins, the Hard Merchandise, the Bounty Hunter, the Tuna.Com and the Odysea steam out together, each captain vowing to catch the biggest tuna before the season ends.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Back In The Hunt
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, head for open seas in hopes of catching the first fish of the Atlantic Bluefin Tuna Season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Go Fish!
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, battle for the elusive and lucrative giant Bluefin tuna, with harpooners going up against rod-and-reelers.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Numbers War
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester battle for prime fishing spots in their quest to catch the elusive and lucrative Bluefin Tuna.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Fish Fight
programme.desc: For the tuna fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, it's tournament time, and, with a big cash prize up for grabs, the fight is on to catch the biggest bluefin.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Shark Attack
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, are facing a dangerous new foe, with great white sharks swarming into local waters.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Sweet Smell of Revenge
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, battle droves of bumbling amateur fishermen in their bid to catch lucrative Atlantic Bluefin Tuna.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Storm Warning
programme.desc: A storm is racing towards the north Atlantic fishing grounds, but with time ticking away on the bluefin tuna season, the captains have no choice but to head out to fish in the rough weather.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Hell On The High Seas
programme.desc: It is week eight of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, and cracks are starting to show in the Gloucester fleet, with captains and crews pushing each other to the limit.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Meltdown
programme.desc: Tensions reach their breaking point amongst the Gloucester fleet as captains, mates and vessels fall apart.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Captain Carnage
programme.desc: It's a battle of wills on the North Atlantic, as two of Gloucester's top Bluefin fishermen - friends-turned-foes Paul Hebert and Dave Carraro - go head-to-head to out-fish each other.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: All Hands On Deck
programme.desc: With only four weeks left in the Atlantic Bluefin season, two boats have the challenge of novice fishermen on board – and it could make or break their season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Uncharted Territory
programme.desc: The Atlantic Bluefin are starting to migrate out of New England waters, so the Gloucester fleet races to find any edge they can, but will their risky new strategies pay off?

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Twice Bitten
programme.desc: With only two weeks left on the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, just one fish is not enough for the Gloucester captains – and the lure of doubling their luck is overpowering.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Money On The Line
programme.desc: In the first episode of a two-part season finale, Gloucester's reigning Bluefin champion Dave Carraro, of FV-tuna.com, starts the fishing season with a $20,000 lead over his rival.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Endgame
programme.desc: With only three days left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the captains of Gloucester race against each other - and an oncoming storm - in the battle to land their final fish of the season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Back In The Hunt
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, head for open seas in hopes of catching the first fish of the Atlantic Bluefin Tuna Season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Go Fish!
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, battle for the elusive and lucrative giant Bluefin tuna, with harpooners going up against rod-and-reelers.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Great Despisers
programme.desc: A 19 year old man comes home one night to discover that his family had all been savagely murdered. Could it be the insurance money and a movie called "The Great Despisers" that motivated the killers to perpetrate such violence?

programme.title: 72 Hours: Jeweler's Wife
programme.desc: The wife of a successful jeweler is found dead in their home. The jeweler immediately falls under suspicion, but he's not alone.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Who Killed Santa?
programme.desc: In 2001, there are a series of murders of homeless people in Toronto. The latest killing is of a gentle man, well known in the area by residents who nicknamed him Santa Claus.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Lust
programme.desc: One morning in the stairwell of a Toronto building, a guard makes a grotesque discovery: the dead body of a Filipina nanny. It's clear she's been savagely murdered and raped.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Angel of Death
programme.desc: An angel of mercy turns out to be an angel of death when the number of deaths in an Indiana Intensive Care Unit skyrockets. One astute nurse believes there must be more to this than just natural causes.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Fat Bandit
programme.desc: A string of bank robberies in Winnipeg confound local police. Most bank-robbers are addicts, usually quite thin. This new man doesn't fit the profile: this bandit is fat.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Pointing to Murder
programme.desc: A withered corpse is found half-buried in a field beside a theme park. Too decayed to identify properly, detectives have only the leathery fingers of one hand to work from.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: In 1998, in a normally peaceful suburb, a pervert on a bicycle appears, performing sexual acts on himself and then attacking teenage girls. For reasons apparent to the residents, they nickname him after the Scottish Loch Ness monster.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Monster of Miramichi
programme.desc: Firemen are called to a blaze and discover two sisters, one dead and the other on death's door. Detectives learn that a man snuck in and brutally sexually assaulted the sisters before setting fire to the house.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hostage
programme.desc: A man robs an armoured car at gunpoint and holds a massage parlor worker hostage. As police investigate, they find startling links to a series of robberies, all taking place during the Christmas season.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Danger in the Woods
programme.desc: Three teenagers accompany a deliveryman to a densely wooded area for a drinking party that, before long, becomes a nightmare. Things take a terrifying turn when one of teens attacks the others.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hijacked
programme.desc: In 1971, before the era of airport security, a Black Panther hijacks a plane to Havana, Cuba. A thirty-year old cold case is finally solved in 2002 by a fluke of modern technology.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Flying Bandit
programme.desc: In 1986, an American becomes one of Canada’s most prolific bank and jewellery bandits after he pulls off one of the biggest heists in Canadian history. As more robberies occur, the police become more determined to catch the mastermind behind them all.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Saint
programme.desc: A frat boy lures a girl to his house with the promise of a party, but once there it turns out he has ulterior motives. When the girl says no, he violently attacks her. A string of violence is finally uncovered, revealing a sinister trail of violence.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Jean-Jacques Le Page Case
programme.desc: On the morning of July 24th 2009, a fire erupts at house in Plougonvelin.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Josiane Bézard Case
programme.desc: On the morning of January 9th 2014, Josiane Bézard, 53 years old, drives her son to the Manosque's train station, and then vanishes.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Evelyne Boucher Case
programme.desc: On December 9th 1987, the naked body of the young Evelyne Boucher is found near Avignon. An unprecedented investigation begins making headlines.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Céline Marchand Case
programme.desc: On May 30th 2015 in Sorinières, Yann Machand reports his wife Céline Marchand missing.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Sylvie Darcy Case
programme.desc: On February 26th 2012, in the Yevelines. Around 11PM policemen are called for an assault in a parking lot in the forest of Saint-Lambet-des-Bois.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Julein Thevenet Case
programme.desc: On January 27th 2014, in Somme-Suippe in the Marne, Sophie Thevenet discovers her dead husband's body in the garage.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Drost Notthoff Case
programme.desc: On September 11th 2011, in Èze, near Monaco, the owner of a luxury villa discovers the lifeless hanging body of his tenant, a rich German businessman.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Under The Knife
programme.desc: A hiker stumbles across a man's dead body in the woods. The victim's brother is convinced he was murdered. Dr. G must get to the bottom of this case. Was foul play really involved?

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: The Mourning After
programme.desc: Rusty Updike has asked his ex-wife Vesta on a cruise. The couple hasn’t seen each other for 15 years but Vesta decides that a cruise with her ex might make for a nice change of pace.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Shock to The System
programme.desc: Police discover the dead body of Andrew Hopper clutching a syringe and covered with blood. The body is in Dr. G’s hands, as are the clues to solving the case.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Lethal Injector
programme.desc: In 1996, nurses and patients at the Veteran's Affairs Medical Center in Northampton are concerned. It seems that wherever nurse Kristen Gilbert goes, death follows.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Yosemite Park Murderer
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day weekend 1999, three tourists from Yosemite National Park disappeared and were found murdered a month later.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Wayne Clifford Boden: The Vampire Rapist
programme.desc: Known as the Vampire Rapist for his distinctive modus operandi, Wayne Boden would rape, strangle and bite the breasts of his victims.
programme.sub-title: Wayne Clifford Boden: The Vampire Rapist

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Victoria Day Shooter
programme.desc: On a single rain-soaked night during the Victoria Day weekend, police are called to the scene of three very similar crimes.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Kid with the Hollywood Haircut
programme.desc: After confessing to the brutal murder of Clarence Pellet in Shelby, Montana, Frank Dryman, a mysterious hitchhiker, is sentenced to hang.
programme.sub-title: The Kid with the Hollywood Haircut

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Teenage Terrors
programme.desc: Six days into 2004, an unidentified man is found stabbed to death just outside of the booming oil city of Calgary, Alberta. Just when the police appear to have no leads, a witness comes forward.

programme.title: Crime Stories: A Way with Murder
programme.desc: Nancy, David and Susan Spangler are found shot to death in their home - the brutal slaughter is deemed a murder suicide.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Long Stemmed Killer
programme.desc: Just hours before her divorce hearing, Atlanta socialite Lita McClinton opens her front door for a flower delivery. The deliveryman hands her a box of roses and then shoots her dead.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Slaying Sweethearts
programme.desc: When Erika DeNardo‚Äôs mother and brother were murdered, she told police and neighbours it had been the work of thieves.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Missing Mom
programme.desc: Stephen Grant reported his wife, Tara Lynn Grant, missing five days after he said she left their house in an unidentified black car.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Terry Driver: The Abbotsford Killer
programme.desc: In 1995, terror descends upon the Bible belt community of Abbotsford, BC. An attack on two teenage girls leaves one dead and starts a 7-month siege of torment.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Allan Legere: The Monster of Miramichi
programme.desc: In 1989, the entire town of Miramichi is held hostage by a monster. A troubled man with a heinous past embarks on a 7-month crime spree, including brutal beatings, rape, arson and serial murder.
programme.sub-title: Allan Legere: The Monster of Miramichi

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Rockhampton Rapist
programme.desc: In the late 1990s, a string of disappearances in Rockhampton, Queensland left police searching for a killer they couldn't identify.

programme.title: Crime Stories: William Fyfe: The Killer Handyman
programme.desc: A man who was once accepted into a small Quebec community turns out to be a murderer, whose crimes cover nearly twenty years.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Killer Schoolboys
programme.desc: The brutally beaten body of First Nations sex trade worker Pamela George is discovered on a cold spring morning just outside Regina, Saskatchewan.

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Marc Dutroux
programme.desc: Marc Dutroux kidnapped, tortured and sexually abused six girls between 1995 and 1996, and he murdered four of them.

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Fred and Rose West
programme.desc: Fred and Rose West raped, tortured and killed young women in their house of horrors, including their own daughter.

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Michael Ryan
programme.desc: In 1987, Michael Ryan went on a killing spree in the quiet market town of Hungerford in Berkshirem before turning the gun on himself.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: Nightmare Before Christmas
programme.desc: The Tiede family has been preparing the ultimate Christmas getaway. But when they arrive at their Utah cabin, two violent criminals - a Satan worshipper and a convicted arsonist - have ransacked the home and are about to unleash unimaginable violence.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Gary cannot stop himself downing up to 24 cans of lager a day.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Patients include a young man with arthritis.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: 8-year-old Marcus suffers with ADHD.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Patients include a young man with suspected leukaemia.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 1
programme.desc: Patrick examines a man who has had a suspected heart attack.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 3
programme.desc: A man with potential spine injuries is given pain relief while waiting for scan results.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: The ambulances are stacking up outside as the fire alarm goes off.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 7
programme.desc: A toddler is brought in with sepsis and 84-year-old Norman has had a fall.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 3
programme.desc: In Yorkshire, biker PC Martin Smith and a team of armed officers are in hot pursuit of a stolen van racing dangerously through the streets of York. With nowhere to hide, the car thieves resort to tactics that put everyone’s lives in danger.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 1
programme.desc: Cornwall paramedics are at full stretch. A sporty stag weekend goes horribly wrong for the husband to be, a teenage diabetic is slipping in and out of consciousness and a young mum is going into labour dangerously early.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 3
programme.desc: In North Yorkshire a quick-thinking motorist has a narrow escape but still helps in the arrest of a drunk driverwho’s three times over the limit. And biker cop Smithy is then called to a crash between a biker and a driver.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Trained to deal with anything, the biker paramedics find themselves dealing with a suspected stroke when a fishmonger collapses at market, a man’s hit crossing the road

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 6
programme.desc: Nurse Hannah is running casualty, but there aren't enough porters to keep things moving.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 6
programme.desc: Dr Julian Humphrey awaits one patient with a rare and dangerous aortic dissection.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 2
programme.desc: The staff at Barnsley Hospital receive patients with a heart attack and chainsaw wounds.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 5
programme.desc: Dr Nick Mani receives a critically ill one-day-old baby.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red: Episode 7
programme.desc: A woman is injured after being thrown out of a car.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red: Episode 9
programme.desc: A driver is trapped in his car after it went out of control.

programme.title: Helicopter ER: Llama Out of Control
programme.desc: Helimed 99 is involved in a race to reach a walker in cardiac arrest on a hill in the North Yorkshire Moors. Plus, a woman is badly injured in a freak accident with a llama.

programme.title: Helicopter ER: Always Look Both Ways
programme.desc: The flying doctors and paramedics of the Yorkshire Air Ambulance are called into action when a train collides with a car at a level crossing, and the race is on to save a toddler who has fallen from an upstairs window.

programme.title: Scorpion: Mother Load
programme.desc: Paige's estranged mother calls on Team Scorpion when she accidentally uncovers a forgotten nuclear reactor on the verge of exploding.

programme.title: Scorpion: This Is The Pits
programme.desc: Walter must swim through the deadly La Brea Tar Pits when Team Scorpion helps a woman trapped in the tar before she runs out of oxygen.

programme.title: Scorpion: Wreck The Halls
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve and Team Scorpion's electronics-free mountain getaway turns deadly when they come across gun-runners, and Ralph is kidnapped when they try to escape.

programme.title: Scorpion: Ice Ca-Cabes
programme.desc: When a mission in the desert results in exploding shrapnel that seriously wounds Cabe, Team Scorpion must freeze his body in order to save his life.

programme.title: Scorpion: Faux Money Maux Problems
programme.desc: When Team Scorpion is duped into producing counterfeit money for a foreign entity intent on ruining the U.S. economy, Paige must rely on her mother Veronica's skills as a grifter to save them.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Hole Truth
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must save a man teetering on the edge of a massive sink hole that threatens to destroy the Los Angeles water supply forever.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sharknerdo
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's job to find sunken treasure goes awry when Walter and Paige's boat explodes, leaving them lost in the middle of the Pacific Ocean surrounded by sharks.

programme.title: Scorpion: Keep It In Check, Mate
programme.desc: Walter and Sylvester enter an international chess competition undercover on foreign soil for Team Scorpion in order to extricate a U.S. spy before her identity is exposed.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dirty Seeds, Done Dirt Cheap
programme.desc: When a simple mission to protect a vital seed bank goes awry, Team Scorpion must save Happy, Sylvester and Cabe, who begin suffering from life-threatening, fear-based hallucinations.

programme.title: Scorpion: Don't Burst My Bubble
programme.desc: Following a severe storm, Happy's friend Ada, who lives in a sterile bubble to protect her compromised immune system, is left with dangerous debris on the verge of puncturing the structure.

programme.title: Scorpion: Monkey See, Monkey Poo
programme.desc: To stop a dangerous virus from spreading, Team Scorpion must locate a rare endangered monkey in the Amazon that has the antibody for the cure.

programme.title: Scorpion: Broken Wind
programme.desc: While on a mission to repair a turbine at a wind farm, Team Scorpion must race to save Paige and Happy before the cable holding the gondola they are in snaps and sends them plummeting to the ground.

programme.title: Scorpion: Rock Block
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must defy the orders of a foreign government after they retrieve an asteroid from space containing DNA strands that could have deadly consequences once exposed.

programme.title: Scorpion: Strife on Mars
programme.desc: Team Scorpion gets trapped inside a failing and dangerous biodome designed for Mars while trying to extract a pair of scientists inside.

programme.title: Scorpion: Something Burrowed, Something Blew
programme.desc: Team Scorpion helps Toby and Happy race to the altar to say "I Do" after a simple job extinguishing a tunnel fire becomes catastrophic.

programme.title: Scorpion: Maroon 8
programme.desc: While en route to Toby and Happy's honeymoon, Team Scorpion's plane crash lands on a remote deserted island, leaving them all with little hope for rescue.

programme.title: Scorpion: Scorp Family Robinson
programme.desc: Three weeks after they crash land on a deserted island, tensions run high for Team Scorpion when they must battle to overcome their relationship obstacles with each other in order to be rescued.

programme.title: Scorpion: Extinction
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must work with their old nemesis Mark Collins in order to prevent the extinction of mankind. Also, Walter and Paige awkwardly navigate their new relationship. Josh Leonard guest stars.

programme.title: Scorpion: More Extinction
programme.desc: Team Scorpion continues to work with their nemesis, Mark Collins, in order to prevent an extinction event that could end humanity. Also, Cabe's last-minute decision while on the case leads to the possible end of his career.

programme.title: Scorpion: Grow a Deer, A Female Deer
programme.desc: When poachers almost kill a pregnant endangered deer, Team Scorpion recreates the animal's womb to try to save it and its baby's life. Also, Happy and Toby discuss the future of their family.
programme.sub-title: Grow a Deer, A Female Deer

programme.title: Scorpion: Nuke Kids on the Block
programme.desc: While decommissioning an old nuclear missile, a simple accident causes Team Scorpion to endure exposure to toxic vapor while trying to prevent the nuke from detonating.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Remorse
programme.desc: Hot Shot insists they should take vengeance on the Decepticons: Scavenger, with the support of the minicons, reminds him of their true purpose. With Hot Shot's realisation of the right way forward, Jetfire hands over command to him.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Depart
programme.desc: With the Autobot ship ready to leave, Hot Shot, supported by the rest of the team, refuse to let the children accompany them. But then the minicons refuse to allow the ship to depart unless the kids are on board.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Miracle
programme.desc: As the Axalon chases the Decepticon ship, hundreds of minicons appear. The 'Cons turn back to fight, and the 'Bots seem doomed, but the minicons resurrect Optimus.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Puppet
programme.desc: Hot Shot and Red Alert are sucked through a wormhole. The minicons guide the Axalon to their location, where they are all attacked by Nemesis Prime. As the planet breaks up, the 'Cons shoot down the Axalon and escape.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Uprising
programme.desc: The 'Bots reach Cybertron to find Megatron (now calling himself Galvatron) already winning the war. The minicons fend off an attack by Unicron, warning of great danger, but Galvatron believes it just an Autobot trick.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Dash
programme.desc: While the battle continues, Hot Shot goes to Cybertron to try to convince Galvatron of the impending danger. Thrust's true allegiance and agenda is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Drift
programme.desc: Thrust flees into the depths of Cybertron, pursued by Hot Shot and Wheeljack - and, separately, Starscream, who saves the children from being killed. The children discover the origins of the minicons.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Portent
programme.desc: Thrust joins Sideways by passing through a portal deep underground: his pursuers follow and find themselves on Cybertron's moon, which begins to disintegrate. To everyone's horror, Unicron is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Cramp
programme.desc: To convince Galvatron he must ally with Optimus to prevent Unicron taking over the universe, Starscream makes the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Alliance
programme.desc: With the Decepticons and Autobots allied, both armadas engage the planet-sized, transformed Unicron in battle in order to save Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Union
programme.desc: The only way to defeat Unicron is to wake the minicons inside him and attack from within as well as without. Red Alert and the kids use the portal to travel to Unicron's core.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Origin
programme.desc: With the minicons protecting Cybertron and Hot Shot's team attacking Unicron from outside, and Optimus and Galvatron facing Sideways at Unicron's heart, the purpose and meaning behind the endless war is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Mortal Combat
programme.desc: With Unicron seemingly defeated, Galvatron insists on settling things with Optimus, and the fight wakes Unicron again. Galvatron makes the ultimate sacrifice to finally end the threat. Jetfire and Hot Shot return the children to earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Fallen
programme.desc: When Cybertron is threatened by a colossal black hole, Optimus Prime and the Autobots give the order to evacuate the planet. However, a mysterious stranger holds one last hope…

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Haven
programme.desc: With the help of their human friends, the Autobots construct a new HQ on Earth, but will Megatron discover their secret base before it's finished?

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Hidden
programme.desc: The Autobots attempt to blend in by assuming alternate transformation modes suitable for Earth. Meanwhile, the Decepticons engage human military forces, and the Autobots are forced to intervene.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Landmine
programme.desc: Landmine tries to adjust to life on Earth while recovering from the injury Starscream's null cannons inflicted on him.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Space
programme.desc: Bud is taken into space so he can see what the Earth is really like, but trouble occurs when he and Scattershot must be saved while the others are fighting against Thundercracker and Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Rush
programme.desc: Hotshot and Megatron race against Override in an attempt to win the first cyber planet key. Will either win when Crumplezone and Ransack are interfering?

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Speed
programme.desc: Starscream plots how he can defend his title as Megatron's right-hand man while Thundercracker lures the Autobots into a trap. Meanwhile, Hot Shot tries another attempt to beat Override.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Collapse
programme.desc: Megatron searches for the Cyber Planet Key with extreme force, while the Autobots try to stop the massive earthquakes that are threatening the city.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Time
programme.desc: Red Alert becomes concerned at the desperate measures Hot Shot is taking to beat Override, while Vector Prime and the kids travel to the Sahara in search of the Omega Lock.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Search
programme.desc: The Autobots join Vector Prime to search for the Omega Lock, while Overhaul is left stranded by a surprise attack by Megatron and Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Deep
programme.desc: Overhaul and Megatron try to convince inhabitants of the Jungle Planet of their 'good' intentions, while the Autobots investigate the appearance of a new Atlantean symbol.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Ship
programme.desc: After the "Atlantis" ship disappeared, Optimus Prime and Megatron head to the moon where it's hiding while Vector Prime and the kids locate the Omega Lock.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Hero
programme.desc: Optimus discovers that Hot Shot has disobeyed his orders while Red Alert has covered for him. However, he is forced to put his trust into Hot Shot to win the Cyber Key from Override.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Race
programme.desc: Hot Shot and the Autobots battle Ransack and Crumplezone in the first round, while Starscream continues to build his forces when he recruits Mudflap and Lori and Bud uncover information on the Ancients' prehistoric visit to Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Detour
programme.desc: As the race for the Speed Planet Cup continues, Hot Shot teaches Override the Autobots' code of honor, while Overhaul faces Scourge on the Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Savage
programme.desc: Koby helps Hot Shot to train for the grueling next leg of the Speed Planet Cup, while Optimus Prime and Vector Prime answer a distress call from the Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Sand
programme.desc: Hot Shot takes a dangerous gamble in the next round of the Speed Planet Cup, while Sideways tries to pit the Autobots against the Decepticons against each other...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Champion
programme.desc: After the terrible injuries sustained in the last race, Hot Shot cannot finish the final race on his own... Leaving Coby to enter the tournament as Hot Shot's driver.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Ice
programme.desc: Bud, Lori and Coby encounter government scientist Professor Suzuki while investigating strange phenomena at the North Pole, while Starscream plans a new attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Honor
programme.desc: Leobreaker disobeys Optimus' direct orders and attacks Scourge. Although Scourge now respects Leobreaker, the incident has caused a rift between him and Optimus...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Primal
programme.desc: Scourge and Optimus Prime battle each other for the Jungle Planet Cyber Key with Override from Speed Planet and Lori from earth being the guest viewers.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Trust
programme.desc: In an attempt to confuse the Decepticons, Optimus makes duplicate cyber keys for each Autobot. Meanwhile Dr. Suzuki makes an amazing discovery at the North Pole.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Trap
programme.desc: The secret history of Earth and Cybertron is revealed with the awakening of monster-hunting Autobot Smokescreen/Crosswise. Meanwhile the Autobots are drawn into a cavern filled with ancient Decepticons...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Invasion
programme.desc: Starscream unleashes the ancient Decepticons in an attempt to find Earth's Cyber Planet Key, Optimus leads the Autobots in battle...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Retreat
programme.desc: The Minicons rescue the kids from the military, while Sideways learns the location of the Autobots' Earth base and leads every Decepticon to Coby's home town...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Revelation
programme.desc: Scourge frees Megatron from Starscream's trap and heads toward Earth. The Autobots must deal with Megatron and locating Starscream's location at the same time.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Critical
programme.desc: Just as all hope is lost, the light of Primus shines down on the fallen Autobot warriors (Scattershot, Red Alert, and Hot Shot) and resurrects them.

programme.title: Survivorman: Tierra del Fuego
programme.desc: Les will be dropped into this inhospitable landscape of Tierra del Fuego, Argentina, the easternmost tip of Isla Grande and left to survive with no food, no shelter, no water, and no safety gear or camera crew.

programme.title: Survivorman: 24hrs
programme.desc: Les and Bill Engvall survive for 24 hours in the deserts of Nevada.

programme.title: Survivorman: Utah Canyonlands
programme.desc: Stroud will cannibalize the mountain-bike he has ridden into the middle of nowhere. He also has a multi-tool, a magnesium flint stick and an old energy bar that he uses for a purpose other than eating

programme.title: Survivorman: Lost at Sea
programme.desc: Les will be set adrift in an inflatable life raft off the coast of Belize. Not only does the life raft have a few bad water leaks, but it also leaks air, requiring Les to frequently re-inflate it.

programme.title: Survivorman: Giants of the Forest
programme.desc: Les returns to the wilderness of remote Alberta to investigate evidence of Sasquatch activity. Armed with infrared camera and thermal imaging technology, Les investigates reports of Bigfoot sightings in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Survivorman: Sierra Nevada Search and Rescue
programme.desc: Les finds himself in the predicament of a lost hiker. Travelling with a typical "day hiker" pack – only provisions for an overnight stay – Les needs to make the most of what he's brought with him.

programme.title: Survivorman: Hunting in Temagami
programme.desc: After all his years of wilderness survival, the forests of Ontario's Temagami still rank as some of the most difficult, harrowing and challenging survival experiences Les has ever faced.

programme.title: Survivorman: African Plains
programme.desc: Survivorman Les Stroud arrives in South Africa via hot air balloon, and must immediately contend with potential danger from lions, hippos, water buffalo and the deadly black mamba.

programme.title: Survivorman: Costa Rica
programme.desc: Marooned on Costa Rica's Osa Peninsula, Les "Survivorman" Stroud has only a few items to aid him for the next 7 days: swimming goggles, 3 ballpoint pens, a multi-tool and the clothing on his back.

programme.title: Survivorman: Cook Islands, South Pacific
programme.desc: Les, equipped with only his scuba gear, is abandoned by his crew at sea to recreate a frightfully common occurrence; separated from your boat and left alone in the ocean waters.

programme.title: Survivorman: Incan O'ero High Priests
programme.desc: Les and crew climb to 16,000 ft up dangerous Mt. Sinkara to join 80,000 indigenous Andeans as they make their yearly pilgrimage to the holy site of Qollorit'i.

programme.title: Survivorman: The Hidden World
programme.desc: Les plants himself in Bigfoot hot spots across North America, collecting stories and experiences from Bigfoot believers, gathering and examining evidence to debunk the mysteries that surround this ancient legend.

programme.title: Survivorman: Georgian Swamp
programme.desc: The swamplands of Georgia's Altamaha River Basin are all that one would expect of a primordial bog; dank, menacing, swimming with slithering creepy crawlies and of course, alligator infested.

programme.title: Survivorman: Indonesia Mentawai
programme.desc: Les begins at the island of Siberut. He journeys 9 hours up river by boat, navigating log-jammed river systems and shallow waters, eventually trekking by foot into the heart of the island.

programme.title: Survivorman: The Lost Pilot Summer
programme.desc: This one-hour special chronicles Les's first time surviving for the cameras in August of 2001. With just two cameras, a few items and his wits, Les survives in the Canadian wild.

programme.title: Survivorman: Legend of Klemtu Hill
programme.desc: There's a volcano in British Columbia where Bigfoot reports are in the hundreds. According to locals, a mysterious animal leaves tracks and even kills people. Les braves the dangers of this Bigfoot hotspot to find the truth behind these strange reports.

programme.title: Survivorman: Norwegian Mountain Survival Part 1
programme.desc: Les Stroud strands himself in the Norwegian mountains to survive for ten days taking little food, no water or gear, and no safety or camera crew.

programme.title: Survivorman: Norwegian Mountain Survival Part 2
programme.desc: Les Stroud is stranded in the Norwegian mountains. Surviving for ten days, Les has no food supplies and little water. Alone and exhausted, Les tests the will to live like never before.

programme.title: Survivorman: Mexican Desert Island Part 1
programme.desc: Les Stroud is shipwrecked on the desert island of Tiburon. With limited food supplies and no fresh water, Les scavenges to survive on the desert shore.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Fire fighters find an entire family dead inside their burned-out home, and at first glance, it appears to be a case of murder-suicide. But clues found at the scene soon lead investigators to believe otherwise.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The homicide of a gay couple leads investigators into the twisted world of White supremacists. Can paint chips and an analysis of glass shards help catch the murder?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police discover a man shot dead in his home after they receive a call from his worried mother. Can clues from a rare gun and the victim's beloved dog help solve the case?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A TV news producer is murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of wrongdoing. Can a DNA data bank help catch the killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to a shooting and discover the dead victim's husband is one of their own. Did the policeman's wife accidentally shoot herself in the head?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of her prescribed drugs. Did she die of natural causes or was it a case of murder?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine near a jogging path. Crucial crime scene evidence had been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Can detectives catch the killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old girl's body is discovered ten days after she disappears, police mount a search for a killer. Can evidence at the crime scene help catch a suspect?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Just weeks before a witness is to testify against the man accused of assaulting her, she is murdered in the front yard of her own home. Can police nail the killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Follow the six year story of a killer who prowled New York. He wrote letters to the police declaring he would kill 12 people, one for each astrological sign.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep, toxicology tests reveal that it may have been foul play. Could a `suicide note' hold the key to solving the case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Could a diary, found years after the murder, help solve this tragic case?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is discovered murdered in his bed, his wife claims it's suicide. Could a tape from a bank surveillance camera prove otherwise?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When the bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, police believe it's no accident. Can a pinprick of blood help to convict a killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Will a discarded sweet wrapper and a few tiny seeds be enough to help forensic scientists discover the identity of a callous murderer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When the body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car, police suspect he may have been murdered. Can a renowned forensic anthropologist uncover the truth?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a pipe bomb rips through a rural home, killing a young man and seriously injuring his mother, detectives hope that the remnants of a mailing label will lead them to a killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A quiet residential community, shattered by the murder of a neighbour. See how modern techniques helped investigators catch the culprit in less than 12 hours.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Bruce Miller was shot to death in his office. The crime scene was clean of fingerprints and hairs, with no trace fibres. Could computer forensics help catch the killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A man is murdered in a drive-by shooting. When a mobile phone trace incriminates a killer, it's up to a forensic geologist to find evidence that he was at the scene.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead, her boyfriend confesses to her murder. However, in a strange twist, so does another man. Who was telling the truth?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a high school gym teacher went missing, investigators suspected foul play. With no body, could the case be cracked with the help of forensic science?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A sixteen-year-old girl was killed by her mother and father, in her own home. Her parents said they acted in self-defence, but the forensic evidence indicated otherwise.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A mysterious computer bug pushes a thriving company to the brink of collapse. Can forensic investigators determine if the crash was the result of sabotage?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: During a routine motorcade for the Queen's US visit, two security cars collide and agents are killed. Investigators reach different conclusions as to the cause of the crash.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In 1993, an Amtrak train crashed, crossing Alabama's Bayou Canot bridge. Forty-seven passengers and crew were killed. Investigators hunt for clues as to the cause of the crash.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a fire erupted at King's Cross Underground, investigators were able to pinpoint the cause. Could they explain why it became a blazing inferno, killing 31 people?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A discarded sleeping bag, containing bloody sneakers and a purse, leads police to the body of a young woman. The autopsy and crime scene were analysed, but it would be a mark found on the victim's body that would enable police to track the killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is killed while walking her dogs in the woods. She has no enemies and her husband has an alibi, so police assume it was a hunting accident until a strange letter turns up, allegedly written by the woman before her death.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The discovery of vital evidence, more than 2,000 miles away from a murder victim's body, helps detectives piece together the case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace. Even though foul play is suspected, the leads don't pan out and the trail turns cold. Twenty years would pass before police are able to link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with the missing woman.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A talented television news anchor was shot to death outside her home. It appeared to be a crime of passion, perpetrated by an obsessed fan. A police dog tracked the scent of the killer through the adjacent woods and back to the crime scene.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A fire kills the 40-year-old estranged wife of a police officer. At first glance, the fire appeared to have been started by an unattended cigarette, but forensic scientists soon discover the cause is far more complicated.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Evidence found at the scene of a malicious double murder points to a man with a criminal record. Will the investigators catch the killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A man is found dead after an apparent robbery, but investigators find evidence to suggest that the suspect ran out of the house rather than into it.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A stockbroker was reported missing by his worried wife, and investigators discover clues in his abandoned car.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Ten years after the disappearance of a college co-ed, investigators use a new technique to try to solve the case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: After a wealthy couple are attacked outside their home, the man was killed and his wife was forced to open their hidden safe. Who knew of the safe is the key to solving the crime.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Mining Truck
programme.desc: If a transporter needs to be transported, if 176 wheels aren't enough to carry its weight and if the load weighs twice as much as the transporter... Then it must be the mother of all mega transports!

programme.title: Mega Transports: Biggest Containership
programme.desc: When the first ship of the brand-new OOCL-fleet gets underway, more cargo is moved at one time than anywhere else in the world and ever before.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Giant Antenna
programme.desc: South America. The chelonian Atacama Desert is home to the world's largest radio telescope Atacama Large Millimeter Array Observatory, also known as ALMA.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Conveyance of the Norwegian Joy
programme.desc: Meyer Werft in Germany is one of the biggest shipbuilders in the world. But it's problem is as big as the ships it builds: the coast and sea are 50 kilometres away.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Siberian Ice Road
programme.desc: A Mega Transport on one of the most dangerous roads in the world. The Siberian Ice Road. It doesn't forgive mistakes. It's treacherous. And unpredictable.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Wind Park
programme.desc: A wind park needs to get from Europe to Asia. Over two thousand tons of highly sensitive and valuable cargo. On one of the world's largest heavy lift vessels.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Stolen Power
programme.desc: Twenty-five kilometers off the coast of Holland, a brave crew of construction workers struggles to erect sixty tall turbine-driven windmills in the wild North Sea. The giant blades of these monster machines will spin at 400 km per hour.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Crossing the Colorado
programme.desc: In a rugged canyon, just downriver from the Hoover Dam, a team of construction veterans is hard at work, building the biggest concrete-arch bridge on the continent.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Hard Rock Park
programme.desc: In Myrtle Beach, South Carolina a team of engineers have just one year to build the world’s first Rock and Roll theme park, Hard Rock Park.

programme.title: Mega Builders: London Olympic Aquatics Centre
programme.desc: A group of engineers in England and Wales has taken on the biggest challenge of the next Summer Olympic Games -- the construction of a complex steel-truss roof for the new Aquatics Centre.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Moving Mountains
programme.desc: With a price tag of 6 Billion American Dollars, The Gotthard Base Tunnel, between Lucerne and Milan, is a mega project by any standard.

programme.title: Mega Builders: King of Container Ships
programme.desc: 3000 shipyard workers build the World's Biggest Container Ship in the biggest little shipyard around, in Odense, Denmark.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Best Of
programme.desc: This season Mega Builders Vl will take viewers back to some of the most amazing engineering projects we’ve ever covered over the past five seasons to see them reach completion after years of hard work.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Suspension Bridges
programme.desc: Suspension bridges – impressively wide and stretched high over supporting cables or stay cables. The landscape-shaping icons: The superlative Golden Gate, Akashi Kaikyo, Aizaih, El Baluarte and Russky Bridge.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Road Bridges
programme.desc: Road bridges: gigantic constructions of modern road traffic. Europa and Ganter Bridge, Öresund bridge, Sunshine Skyway and Viaduct de Millau.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Steel Bridges
programme.desc: Steel bridges are extremely durable and multifunctional, fascinating not only due to its gigantic size but also because of the army of workers keeping the bridges in shape: whether on the historical landmark in Sydney or ultramodern mega bridges in China.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Moving Bridges
programme.desc: Moving Bridges: Exotic milestones on moveable infrastructure. Historically significant: the Kaiser Wilhelm Bridge and the Michigan Avenue bridge. Mechanically unique: the Pont Jacques, the Gateshead Millennium Bridge or the Scale Lane Bridge.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Railway Bridges
programme.desc: Railway bridges fascinate through different construction methods from masonry, truss-beam bridges to steel-concrete arch bridge. Heavier loads, faster speeds, more frequently: trains speed over bridges and the maintenance teams face ever larger challenges

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Litter Bug
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Bitterroot
programme.desc: Opening day of big game season is busy for Montana's Game Wardens. Follow along as they patrol the Bitterroot game area. Plus, the wardens set up a sting to catch poachers, complete with a moving decoy.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation H2O
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Moonshine

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders: Episode 8
programme.desc: PC Andy Doran pulls over a driver for using his mobile phone behind the wheel.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders: Episode 9
programme.desc: PC Andy Doran responds to a collision on the A6, where a tired driver has fallen asleep.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders: Episode 10
programme.desc: Anton Sullivan pulls over a driver with an unsecured rubber boat tied to his car.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders: Episode 1
programme.desc: Inspector Sullivan looks for an escaped prisoner believed to be a high risk to the public.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders: Episode 2
programme.desc: PCs Matt Turner and Rich Woodward are on the tail of an uninsured vehicle.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Liverpool
programme.desc: The famous port's wealthy history has inextricably contributed to its prosperous underworld, wherein the likes of Charlie Seiga, Curtis Warren and Shaun Smith thrived.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Birmingham
programme.desc: Examining the notorious Peaky Blinders, the flourishing gang culture in the sixties with links to the Krays, and how this culture continues today.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Alternative Ulster
programme.desc: We cross the Irish Sea and the stories take a more political turn. Specifically we explore the infiltration of drugs into Ireland, and the relationship between terrorists, politicians and organised crime.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Essex
programme.desc: Welcome to Essex. With a huge club scene and an entrepreneurial spirit, it was a natural breeding ground for new and old criminals alike. Bernard O'Mahoney explores the consequences for what became one of Britain's most notorious criminal hotbeds.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Skeletons
programme.desc: When a young woman is reported missing, the officers of 15 Division soon discover a possible copycat connection to one of their division’s most distressing cases. With the clock ticking, Gail must face her worst fears..

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: When human bones found in a ravine open up a 15-year-old missing persons case, Swarek reunites with his old training officer to solve the case

programme.title: Rookie Blue: For Better, For Worse
programme.desc: Everyone at 15 Division, especially Andy, just wants a quick, smooth shift so they can get to Frank and Noelle’s wedding. But things get complicated when they get called to a hijacked casino bus full of senior citizens

programme.title: Rookie Blue: What I Lost
programme.desc: When Chris returns for a visit, his reunion takes a shocking turn when his son, Christian, is abducted while under the care of Andy and Nick

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Are Here
programme.desc: Near the end of shift, 15 Division busts a marijuana grow-op – a case that becomes Traci’s first homicide and forces Andy, Nick and Gail to work overtime

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deception
programme.desc: When a suspected pedophile is found beaten within an inch of his life, Andy discovers Marlo has been conducting a mania-fueled, off-hours “investigation”

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Under Fire
programme.desc: After Andy and Chloe take fire from an unseen shooter, the officers realize they are the targets of someone with a grudge against 15 Division

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Can See the Stars
programme.desc: In the wake of a targeted attack on the officers of 15 Division (ep. 412), Andy, Swarek, and their fellow officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw – in time to save his life

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Blink
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the night’s traumatic events, Andy and Dov try to pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-duty and off-guard in a volatile diner hold-up.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: All by Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie, Duncan Moore. But when Andy and Duncan respond to a messy homicide at a pawnshop, it’s clear this rookie is going to give Andy the challenge of a lifetime.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Heart Breakers, Money Makers
programme.desc: When Andy and Nick’s seizure at an illegal gambling house leads to a suspicious confession, Andy recruits Sam to help figure out who’s lying, why, and where the money is, before anyone gets hurt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Wanting
programme.desc: When a tenement-building shooting leads to the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must race to find the killer before a gang war breaks out

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Going Under
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar that’s a possible hub for illegal handguns, Chris’s erratic behavior and concern for a specific drug dealer make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers of 15 Division try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road to interview a list of inmates at Millburn Penitentiary.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: In the midst of a chaotic day at the station, Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: Chris’s addiction issues come to a head when an innocuous call to a middle-class home puts Dov and Chris in the middle of a suspicious home invasion investigation

programme.title: Rookie Blue: "Moving Day"
programme.desc: 15 Division is assigned to a community outreach program, “Moving Day”, to help tenants move out of a subsidized-housing complex that’s being torn down

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fragments
programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet. But personal feelings get thrust aside when a bomb explodes in a downtown parking garage

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Everlasting
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division work to track down TED MCDONALD (the car-bomber from Ep. 510). But even after catching him, they realize Ted has more targets set to explode out there. The clock is ticking

programme.title: My Summer Prince
programme.desc: When a prince (Jack Turner) who is heir to the throne lands in hot water for his partying ways, a PR consultant is hired by the royal family to perform some damage control.

programme.title: The Secret: Dare to Dream
programme.desc: Miranda Wells is a hardworking young widow who's struggling to raise three children on her own. She soon meets a mysterious man who reignites the family's spirit -- but he carries a secret that could also change everything.

programme.title: The Dog Who Saved Summer
programme.desc: After their dog Zeus ruins a party, George takes him to an obedience school run by a no-nonsense instructor. When Zeus manages to fail every test, he seeks help from a trainer with special techniques.

programme.desc: When a prince (Jack Turner) who is heir to the throne lands in hot water for his partying ways, a PR consultant is hired by the royal family to perform some damage control.

programme.desc: Miranda Wells is a hardworking young widow who's struggling to raise three children on her own. She soon meets a mysterious man who reignites the family's spirit -- but he carries a secret that could also change everything.

programme.title: The Dog Who Saved Summer
programme.desc: After their dog Zeus ruins a party, George takes him to an obedience school run by a no-nonsense instructor. When Zeus manages to fail every test, he seeks help from a trainer with special techniques.

programme.title: The Secret: Dare to Dream
programme.desc: Miranda Wells is a hardworking young widow who's struggling to raise three children on her own. She soon meets a mysterious man who reignites the family's spirit -- but he carries a secret that could also change everything.

programme.title: Traffik
programme.desc: A couple and their two friends embark on a weekend getaway to an isolated estate in the mountains. They soon find themselves in a fight for their lives when members of a violent biker gang show up to protect their secrets from the outside world.

programme.title: Open Water
programme.desc: Scuba divers (Blanchard Ryan, Daniel Travis) struggle to survive in shark-infested waters after their tour boat accidentally leaves them behind.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Mutant X unearths an old military experiment involving an age-reversal serum and is surprised to discover that Jesse's grandfather is a one of the test subjects.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Discovering that their teammate Lexa is the subject of a covert experiment that is controlling her, the Mutant X team hunts for the doctor responsible.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: When Jesse's life hangs in the balance, Brennan must connect to him and lead him through past memories they've shared in order to save his life.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Phantom Companion
programme.desc: While on board the mothership, Renee sustains an injury and while being treated, she gets pulled into the walls and disappears.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Dream Stalker
programme.desc: Street asks Liam to help a friend who's arrested for the murder of a man he hated. Liam talks to him and he claims that he dreamed of killing him.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Lost Generation
programme.desc: A CVI malfunctions and kills a soon-to-be father. The investigation leads Liam and Renee to a fertility clinic. Renee finds out she is infertile and suspects that Taelon technology is affecting worldwide fertility.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Summit
programme.desc: Da'an leaves and doesn't being Liam along. Zo'or is frantic as to why Da'an left. Liam wants to help but Zo'or doesn't trust him because he doesn't have a CVI, so Liam agrees to be implanted.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Dark Matter
programme.desc: When the mother ship hits dark matter, the ship dos not begin to heal itself. Zo'or is left in an unconscious state and Sandoval takes control. He decides it is time to liberate the Earth from the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Keys to the Kingdom
programme.desc: The relic left by Ma'el is stolen from the mother ship. Zo'or threatens to destroy a major city if it isn't returned. Liam believes the final chapters contain information on synthesizing core energy.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Street Chase
programme.desc: Sandoval is watching via nanobots inside Street as she tries to decipher Ma'el's riddle. She tries to figure out how to escape from Sandoval and the Taelons forcing her to solve the riddle. She flashes back to childhood fears.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Trapped by Time
programme.desc: Liam and Renee learn of a facility where time travelers from the future are being held. They try to learn from them what happens to the Taelons. Sandoval's wife is used as a pawn to gain important information from him.

programme.title: The Lost World: Paradise Found
programme.desc: While searching for Veronica's parents, the explorers find themselves in a hidden land of paradise. They must resist temptation when they discover a magical fruit that promises immortality.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Beast Within
programme.desc: Malone goes after a healer that's been filled with the spirit of a demon in exchange for safe release from the village. The girls must set their differences aside and learn to trust each other.

programme.title: The Lost World: Creatures of the Dark
programme.desc: Challenger tries to convince an underground civilization of the dangers of an active volcano ready to blow. In the meantime Veronica, Roxton, and Summerlee try to outrun the Vantu.

programme.title: The Lost World: Tribute
programme.desc: Challenger, Roxton, and Veronica teach the Tintas how to retaliate against the Hikari so that they may be independent. Meanwhile Marguerite, Summerlee, and Malone help a WWI pilot fix his plane.

programme.title: The Lost World: Absolute Power
programme.desc: A powerful light ray from an ancient temple knocks Professor Challenger unconscious. As the explorers try and save him, he occupies an alternate reality in his mind where he has godlike powers.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Carentan
programme.desc: The Sanctuary receives reports that several people have gone missing, all around the town of Carentan in the Normandy region of France.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Out Of The Blue
programme.desc: Meet Helen and Will: neighbors on a tree-lined, suburban street. Helen lives alone, dislikes her neighbor’s dog and is a talented painter.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Into The Black
programme.desc: The Sanctuary receives alarming news that a large group of Abnormals has been spotted at the entrance to a cave in South Dakota.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Tempus
programme.desc: Adam Worth destroys Praxis and travels back in time to the 1890s to save his daughter. Dr. Magnus travels back in time to stop him before he damages the time line and destroys her future with it.

programme.title: The UFO Battle of Los Angeles
programme.desc: 1942 LA: A mysterious UFO causes blackout & artillery fire. Remains unexplained.

programme.title: UFO Hunters: The Italian Ufologists
programme.desc: Italian researchers explore mass UFO sightings, clipeology, and real testimonies, delving into the history and research methods of ufology.

programme.title: Alien Mind Control: The UFO Enigma
programme.desc: This fascinating documentary offers an unprecedented look at a group of individuals who claim to have had life altering UFO encounters, and discovers the unique psychic abilities they unknowingly share.

programme.title: Linda Napolitano: The Alien Abduction of the Century
programme.desc: Linda Napolitano's 1989 alien abduction is the abduction case of the century.

programme.title: Aliens Among Us: The Michael Wolf Theory
programme.desc: Michael K. Wolf shares 30 years of insights on UFOs, aliens, government projects, and crop circles.

programme.title: Confessions Of An Alien Abductee
programme.desc: Chantelle, Marie and Simon are all alien abductees. These ordinary people share their extraordinary stories as they seek help through the curiously named Anomalous Mind Management Abductee Contactee Helpline, or AMMACH.

programme.title: Aliens Against Nuclear War: Edgar Mitchell
programme.desc: 12 moonwalkers claim ET visited Earth, govt covered it up. Aliens stopped nuclear war. Crazy or worth hearing more?

programme.title: The Hills' Abduction: The Zeta Reticuli Incident
programme.desc: Barney & Betty Hill's abduction and the Zeta reticuli incident explored.

programme.title: Alien Reptilian Legacy
programme.desc: Researchers reveal the presence of a supreme and nefarious interdimensional intelligence that has been manipulating mankind for centuries. Interviews with experiencers and alien abductees expose a sinister agenda behind the alien presence on Earth.

programme.title: Project Serpo
programme.desc: 2005: Ex-agent unveils 3,000-page report on a secret ET exchange mission to planet Serpo

programme.title: Alien Paranormal: Bigfoot, UFOs and the Men in Black
programme.desc: Are Bigfoot creatures traveling to earth in UFO's, and being covered-up by Men in Black? Experience terrifying, real events as documented by top authorities, including: Aliens attacking a house; Alien Abductions to create a hybrid race; vortexes and more!

programme.title: Close Encounters: Proof of Alien Contact
programme.desc: This documentary examines whether UFOs are real. It studies over 250 amateur video clips, evaluates several recent revelations about Roswell, and examines footage of the removal of an alien implant.

programme.title: Alien Agenda: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Alien Agenda Planet Earth reveals the shocking truth about UFOs and Extraterrestrials, a truth that has been suppressed and hidden for centuries.

programme.title: Ancient Alien America
programme.desc: Native cultures have handed down shocking accounts for generations of Aliens from other worlds visiting Earth in the ancient past and their involvement with them.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 2
programme.desc: Respectable dad Stephen aims to see the back of a crude tattoo he had 20 years ago. Tattoo-mad ex-solider Rob's phallic self-portrait is a step too far, and Leeanneah has lyrics tattooed on her chest.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 10
programme.desc: Scott's terrible tattoo takes his love for Norwich City FC too far. Jay has space-loving Dan's back with an out-of-this-world cover. Sketch tackles a cover to help transgender Jai feel more feminine.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Eccentric dancer Marina wants a confidence-boosting tattoo cover to get her back onto the podium. The artists see double when identical twins Hayley and Rebecca come in with matching bad body art.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4
programme.desc: Lisa pays tribute to her idol Robbie Williams, while Jack covers his literal leg tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Glen tackles Hannah's four-letter faux pas, and Jay gives firefighter Simon a hot design.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 11
programme.desc: Jay covers Jack's offensive nickname tatt, while Sketch sweeps away Mark's cobwebs.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Belieber Nathan decides it's time for Sketch to rid him of his embarassing fan tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 7
programme.desc: Sketch meets Billy, whose habit of tattooing himself to impress ladies has got out of hand.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 3
programme.desc: House fire survivor Steve has his scarring covered with a Celtic knot design, Amy swaps an embarrassing marriage proposal for a tribute to her favourite dinosaur, and Sam's X-rated nickname is hidden.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4
programme.desc: John's tattoo is on another planet, while Alec has made a big mistake with a tiny inking.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Jay covers paramedic Anthony's tattoo, which is putting the frighteners on his patients. Alice disguises Sonny's unwanted present from his mates. Sketch tackles Alex's drunken DIY teddy bear design.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 12
programme.desc: Sketch is monkeying around with Jenny, Joe's Gary Lineker tat gets the red card and Alice fixes Sannahs unfortunate inking error.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 14
programme.desc: Sketch and Jay double team Luke's bum art, Alice eases Katie's period pain, Glen puts a snowman on ice while Sketch tattoos a butcher who minced his arm off.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 7
programme.desc: Drag queen Devon feels snared by his barbed-wire tattoo because it's a painful reminder of an ex. Alice welcomes Halloween-loving Chippy, whose portrait of her daughter is more than a little spooky.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: The team tackle Sam's embarrassing tattoo, which has earned him a serious ultimatum, deal with holiday ink that Ryan doesn't remember getting, and rid Adam of a lasting reminder of his ex.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4
programme.desc: Lisa pays tribute to her idol Robbie Williams, while Jack covers his literal leg tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4
programme.desc: The team help Georgie, who had such a wild time with the boys on holiday she commemorated the trip with a tattoo that's left her single ever since. Alice takes on Kelly's animation-inspired disaster.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 12
programme.desc: Glen devours Harri's fast food foul-up, while Sketch knocks out boxer Russell's tattoo.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A young racing driver learns how to handle the unique and venerable racing car the Napier-Railton, built in the 1930s. Plus, a race winning Harrier jump-jet, and its pilot, are reunited.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: The motorbike team create a new lubrication system to keep a 1930s BSA motorbike running. Plus, a Mini Metro and red Corvette turn heads at the Members Classic Car Show.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A rare Brooklands glider is given a new chance at flight. Plus, a 1930s race team is pushed to the max at Goodwood.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars

programme.desc: Catie Munnings tests the BAC Mono R at Goodwood Circuit, Duncan Pittaway explores the classic Bugatti Type 35, and engineer Dan Dickrell heads off to Florida to witness swamp racing.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The startling truth behind historical legends. Jamie Theakston investigates the curious claim that the Nazis were engaged in building flying saucers during World War II.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston brings to light the life and work of enigmatic inventor Nikola Tesla. Conspiracy theorists believe that the Serb was hushed up - but why?

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston sheds light on the ultra-secretive Rosicrucian Order, whose members included Leonardo Da Vinci and Isaac Newton. Are they the real-life 'illuminati'?

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston decodes history's most intriguing riddles. Petra was the capital of the Nabataean kingdom and now he wants to look for riches that may lie hidden in the tombs beneath it.

programme.desc: Can Jamie Theakston solve history's most enduring mystery? Visiting Glastonbury, Wales, Valencia and NYC, he inspects four goblets that could be the Holy Grail itself.

programme.desc: Paramedics desperately try to save a patient whose heart has stopped for more than 15 minutes. Elsewhere, a pregnant woman struggles to breath and a young lad has a deep cut in his hand.

programme.title: Eat Your Heart Out with Nick Helm
programme.desc: The only way is rural Essex for famished funnyman Nick Helm, who mucks in as he grinds his own meat, plucks turkeys and hunts rabbits in a farm-to-fork experience.

programme.title: Eat Your Heart Out with Nick Helm
programme.desc: While in Soho, Nick Helm enjoys a fried chicken breakfast, ramen, and soup dumplings with two famous pals.

programme.title: Eat Your Heart Out with Nick Helm
programme.desc: In between gigs at Machfest, food-loving funnyman Nick Helm enjoys a vegan platter with Rhod Gilbert and visits a Willy Wonka-style sweet shop.

programme.title: Eat Your Heart Out with Nick Helm
programme.desc: In Islington, Nick shares a chop with Bob Mortimer.

programme.title: Eat Your Heart Out with Nick Helm
programme.desc: Nick Helm has landed the dream job - meeting comedy heroes and eating tasty scran. Nick invents his own cocktail and meets vegan Morgana Robinson - at a steakhouse.

programme.title: Eat Your Heart Out with Nick Helm

programme.title: Eat Your Heart Out with Nick Helm
programme.desc: Lovelorn funnyman Nick Helm takes his mind off women by pigging out. In Brighton, Nick enjoys some American pancakes and goes veggie with Thunder's Luke Morley.

programme.title: Eat Your Heart Out with Nick Helm
programme.desc: Funny foodie Nick Helm sets sail for Berlin with Yara Greyjoy, aka actor Gemma Whelan. Currywurst, Korean BBQs and Turkish tapas are on the very multi-cultural menu.

programme.title: Eat Your Heart Out with Nick Helm
programme.desc: Newly single comic Nick Helm mends his broken heart, by pumping it full of tasty food. Nick returns home for waffles with bacon, curry and mum's prawn lasagne.

programme.title: Eat Your Heart Out with Nick Helm
programme.desc: Nick Helm enjoys a romantic, culinary getaway to Paris, but with comedian David Trent in tow, not his now ex-girlfriend. The odd couple savour oysters and champagne.

programme.title: Eat Your Heart Out with Nick Helm
programme.desc: Nish Kumar joins Nick in London for a Brexit-defying continental feast. The pair enjoy Italian, Portuguese and Polish nosh on their jaunt round the capital.

programme.desc: Comedian Nick Helm samples some lovely jubbly scran in Peckham. On the menu at two imaginatively named eateries - a bao bun at Mr Bao and tapas at Miss Tapas.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 1
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade returns with a new series of everyday adventurers hoping to make it to the Crystal Dome, starting with The Gamers.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 6
programme.desc: In tonight’s show Team Well Read and Underfed, a group of plucky students, attempt to take on the maze. Will they graduate with honours?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 2
programme.desc: It's takes self-belief, attitude and quick wits to conquer the maze. Tonight's team, The London Girls, are over-flowing with two of the three. Will Maze Master Richard Ayoade ever be able to keep control of this calamitous and kamikaze bunch?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 3
programme.desc: Maze Master Richard Ayoade leads The Holmes Family around the maze as they attempt to win precious crystals and not have a major falling out.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tonight’s team are huge fans of the original series and have engaged in intensive research on how to tackle the challenges ahead. Sometimes all the preparation in the world can be utterly pointless.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 5
programme.desc: In tonight’s show a team called The Cheerleaders, five disproportionately excitable young ladies, hope enthusiasm will help them in their quest through the maze.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tonight's team, Let's Get Medical, are a group of medical students. Your lives may soon be in their hands. You may have concerns after witnessing this lot attempt to tackle the mighty maze.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 8
programme.desc: This week’s team of Welsh hopefuls met working at Pizza Hut. How will they cope with the maze when some of their team appear to have no concept of urgency?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 13
programme.desc: In tonight’s show we see a team of police officers hoping to lay down the law in the maze…but will they end up locked behind bars?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 2
programme.desc: The Air Cadets bring a bravado bonanza to the maze this week. They begin the night predicting big things, but will they deliver?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tonight's celebrity adventurers are Spencer Matthews, Stacey Solomon, Tom Allen, Andrea McLean and Joe Swash.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 4
programme.desc: This gathering of the Crystal Maze is captained by actor Sunetra Sarker as she pilots plucky TV broadcaster Matthew Wright, seasoned politician Anne Widdecombe actor Nikki Sampson and reality TV Hunk Wes Nelson.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 8
programme.desc: This show sees DJ Matt Edmondson lead his teammates TV legend Debbie McGee, dancer Kimberley Wyatt, retired footballer Michael Owen and reality TV star Chris Hughes.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 3
programme.desc: Crystal Maze team captain actor Nancy Sorrell leads her fellow adventurers, comedian Jim Moir (AKA: Vic Reeves), reality TV’s Ferne McCann, former cricketer Graeme Swann and comedian Susan Calman, on a wild ride through the 4 zones.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 3
programme.desc: This week’s celebrities taking on the maze are Rylan Clarke, Adil Ray, Tamara Wall and Joel Dommett.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 4 - Joe, Radzi, Kate, Ashley, Richard
programme.desc: This week broadcasting legend Richard Madeley captains his team featuring comedian Joe Wilkinson, broadcaster Kate Garraway, Blue Peter’s Radzi Chinyanganya, and Pussycat Dolls star Ashley Roberts.
programme.sub-title: Celeb 4 - Joe, Radzi, Kate, Ashley, Richard

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 1
programme.desc: Tonight’s celebrity adventurers are Steve Jones, Scarlett Moffatt, David Coulthard, Jodie Kidd & Joey Essex.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 2
programme.desc: Maze Master Richard Ayoade is convinced that all successful teams entering the maze are captained by women. Will presenter Anita Rani be the first to fail spectacularly?
