programme.desc: Welcome to Staten Island, the land of fierce women who never admit to being allegedly "connected" - until now. Left alone to pick up the pieces, these women face the harsh realities of "life" after informants have turned their families' lives upside down.

programme.title: Mob Wives: The Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Just as Renee swallows the bitter pill of losing both Junior and her Father to jail, explosive rumors surrounding Junior's surrender run wild throughout the streets of Staten Island.

programme.title: Mob Wives: What Goes Around
programme.desc: The rumors that have everyone on Staten Island chirping hit the New York Post, confirming that Junior is a 'rat' and has been wearing a wire on Renee's father.

programme.title: Mob Wives: If Books Could Kill
programme.desc: As Karen prepares for her book release party, she's left to face some harsh critics from her past while Drita is once again forced to deal with the idea that she and Lee might be in the book.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Taking The Rap
programme.desc: As Renee deals with the fallout of her father taking the rap and Junior's betrayal, she becomes determined to get Karen and Drita to resolve their differences.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The Murder of Imette St Guillen explores the hours and events leading up to her horrific death and the large-scale police investigation that identified her killer.
programme.sub-title: The Murder of Imette St Guillen

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation into Brianna's kidnapping and murder and how police and forensics identified her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Monstrous Murder in Morena is the story of how a dedicated police team and cutting-edge forensics solved Angela Kleinsorge's murder after 25 years.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The investigation into the shooting and how the FBI and FMPD identified the killer and brought him to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation into a body found in a plastic container and how the killer is found.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the 35-year investigation and forensic advances that identify Rosa's savage killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of a sadistic crime and how investigators brought the merciless attacker to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The investigation to catch a serial rapist and how advanced DNA technology finally tracked him down.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: How investigators uncovered what happened in the moments leading up to the death of Jchandra Brown.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: An innocent victim was lured to his death and cutting edge forensics helped to find the killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When the body of a child is found, Boston State Police have no leads, but with the help of the National Centre for Missing and Exploited Children, a trace is found.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Tracie Andrews purportedly witnessed the murder of her boyfriend, Lee Harvey, in a country lane on the night of 1st December 1996; but all was not what it seemed.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: David Jackson left his home to buy beer and cigarettes. He was never seen again. For 15 years his disappearance remained unsolved, until one investigator broke the case wide open.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Rachel O'Reilly was savagely murdered in her home, in what looked like a burglary gone wrong. A ground-breaking investigation finally put her killer behind bars.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A killer, who stalked and gained his victim's trust, enticed her to her death. Almost two decades later scientific advances brought the perpetrator to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Laura Garza told friends she was going on a night out at the Marquee Club. When she didn't show for work the next day a search ensued to find her as well as the men she left with.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When police investigated a brutal murder, false claims of guilt nearly derailed the investigation, but the victim's family never gave up trying to find the killer.
programme.sub-title: The Murder of Beverley Ann Dyke

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 22nd December 1979, Phyllis Murphy disappears after doing some Christmas shopping. When she doesn't come home, her family fear the worst, but it's not until a month later in the Wicklow Mountains that her body is discovered.

programme.title: South Park: The Sexual Harassment Panda
programme.desc: The Sexual Harassment Panda: After a school educational talk from Petey the Panda, Cartman decides to sue Stan for sexual harassment. Suing fever starts to grip the entire town! (S3, E06)

programme.title: South Park: Cat O*gy (Part 1)
programme.desc: Cat O*gy (1): Stan's sister Shelley babysits Cartman and invites her unsuitable boyfriend, Skyler, to join her. Meanwhile Cartman's cat is on heat and it's not long before he's got company! (S3, E07)

programme.title: South Park: Two Guys Naked in a Hot Tub (Part 2)
programme.desc: Two Guys Naked In A Hot Tub (2): Stan and his parents go to a party at Mr Mackey's but when the boys make a prank phone call to the police they surround the house and are ready to open fire. (S3, E08)
programme.sub-title: Two Guys Naked in a Hot Tub (Part 2)

programme.title: South Park: Chinpokomon
programme.desc: Chinpokomon: Stan, Cartman, and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan, a cartoon called Chinpokomon - but what is the secret plan behind the show's anti-American sentiments...? (S3, E11)

programme.title: South Park: Starvin' Marvin In Space
programme.desc: Starvin' Marvin In Space: Marvin is back! He and the boys travel around the world in an alien spaceship on a food-gathering mission, hotly pursued by the CIA and Sally Struthers. (S3, E13)

programme.title: South Park: Korn's Groovy Pirate Ghost Mystery
programme.desc: Korn's Groovy Pirate Ghost Mystery: The boys are being plagued by the 5th graders and South Park is overrun by Pirate Ghosts. Nu-Metal band Korn must save the day! (Scooby-Doo parody). (S3, E10)

programme.title: South Park: Hooked on Monkey Fonics
programme.desc: Hooked on Monkey Fonics: The boys compete against a couple of home schooled kids in South Park's annual spelling bee. (S3, E12)

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Four survivors come together in the ultimate home-made robotic showdown - and only one of them can claim victory.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Eight more robots battle to win the last available place in the semi-final.
programme.sub-title: The Second Wars: The Grudge Matches

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A compilation of highlights to end the series in which contestants guide home-made robots through mechanical challenges.
programme.sub-title: The Second Wars: The Best Of Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: An insightful behind-the-scenes look into how the second season of `Robot Wars' was made.
programme.sub-title: The Second Wars: Making of Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Dogs enter the ring as they munch and crunch their way into victory. Some will let off steam while others sends out flames of destruction.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The competitors waste no time getting stuck into the fray in the four way melees, with one robot seemingly dominating the competition. The house robots may be a little rusty as a robot launches an attack.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Heat C welcomes back familiar faces in the arena, as former champions return with old tricks up their sleeves.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Sir Chromalot returns to the arena to take on seven other mean machines. Steve must raise its previous form to send others tumbling.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The robots battle it out to send the crowd wild and their competition to robot heaven. Plus, 259 proves to be a genuine top contender.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Both old and new contenders must endure and evade the traps in the arena, full of flippers and pits. Meanwhile, Demolition Man is on a mission.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Tornado proves to be a strong contender in the arena, while house robots test the strength of newbies and push their limit.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: To qualify as semifinalists, contenders must emerge from the hustle of the house robots and survive the dance of death.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The arena is full of the bizarre and the befuddled as contenders are axed, tossed, and crushed. Only the strongest will survive.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: One semifinalist goes through to the next round with only three spots left. House robots like Growler make things difficult as they attempt to thwart the challengers' quests for victory.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The arena is filled with chaos as a granny is dropped among the contestants. Plus, the drop zone brings some serious disaster.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The contenders turn up the heat in the arena as they battle it out for a place in the semifinals. They must survive through the chaos.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The remainder of the contenders must handle the hustle through the bustle with the meat and muscle in the first of the semifinals.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: To secure one of two places in the grand final, the contenders must crank up their weapons and teamwork.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The grand final hosts an explosive line-up with both the return of reigning champions and some determined newbies.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Four robots from Germany, four robots from the UK. The competitors will fight their fellow compatriots for a chance to represent their country in a Germany against UK final to decide which country has the most ferocious machine.
programme.sub-title: The Sixth Wars: UK vs Germany

programme.title: A Haunting: Casa de los Muertos
programme.desc: Eddie Benitez fears the spirit of a dead man who committed suicide is slowly killing his son.

programme.title: A Haunting: Tunnel Of Death
programme.desc: Candace and John St. Clair explore a haunted tunnel with a gruesome history where slaves were buried alive. Stealthily, an uninvited guest follows them home. Attacked by the entity, they invite paranormal experts to investigate and cleanse the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Attic
programme.desc: A series of photographs show what you cannot see with the naked eye: an evil face in the attic.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Awakening
programme.desc: Marcy’s son is deployed with the Army. Overcome with worry, a dormant spirits threatens her.

programme.title: A Haunting: Nightmare Upstairs
programme.desc: The VanLandingham family moves to a larger house in the small town of Wynne, Arkansas. What they first consider "house-settling" noise and behavior quickly turns into a full-scale supernatural physical attack on both daughters Brianna and Heather.

programme.title: A Haunting: House of Nightmares
programme.desc: When Tracey Berrios experiences paranormal activity inside her new home, she suspects spirits tied to the house's history. But after something evil attacks Tracey, she fears for the safety of her family and turns to paranormal investigators for help.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Wheatsheaf Horror
programme.desc: New owners of the Wheatsheaf Pub find bits of clothing and bones behind the walls.

programme.title: A Haunting: Child’s Play
programme.desc: The loving spirit of Chris' late grandmother is watching over his close-knit family. But she is trying to warn them: a fierce and relentless demon has crept into their home. Chris reaches out to a paranormal team and a demonologist to battle the demon.

programme.title: A Haunting: Black Magic
programme.desc: During the renovation of her 150-year-old Pennsylvania home, Debbie Guy accepts the old house has a ghost and they will have to live with it. But when family members are tormented by an evil entity, Debbie seeks the help of paranormal investigators.

programme.title: A Haunting: Face Of Evil
programme.desc: Joy, a working mother of three, assumes a girl's weekend at a haunted plantation will be a pleasant change of pace. But after she returns, her youngest child's sleep is shattered by the ominous presence of a dark phantom.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Hunter
programme.desc: Stacy is a paranormal investigator. When a demon attacks her son she asks a colleague for help.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Confessions
programme.desc: An unknown entity appears to find pleasure in terrifying 17-year-old Macy Sherman, her younger sister Kelsey and their mom Carrie. The family reaches out for help, praying that they can get rid of the spirit intent on staying in their home forever.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Fury
programme.desc: Shortly after Alicia and Scott Cain move into a farmhouse in the quiet Ohio countryside, they learn their home was the site of a brutal murder decades earlier. Plagued by the ghosts of this horrific event, they call in the Fourman Brothers to investigate.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hidden Terror
programme.desc: After Mike and Lisa move in their new house, Lisa’s personality begins to change dramatically.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghostly Voices
programme.desc: Angelina Balistreri believes her home is haunted by a harmless ghost, while her husband, Emiliano, is skeptical of the paranormal. They call in a priest and medium who makes contact with a troubled ghost and helps him cross over and find peace.

programme.title: A Haunting: Mind Control
programme.desc: When William falls ill, Amanda Morrison's family volunteer to clean his home. But after the family stumbles across satanic objects in the home, strange things start happening. A demonologist cleanses the home and discovers the reason behind the haunting.

programme.title: A Haunting: Phantom Room
programme.desc: Shari and Erol find the perfect California home to raise Shari’s two young daughters. When they discover a mysterious secret room hidden inside their garage, it triggers a ghostly presence. Now, Shari knows she must do something to protect her daughters.

programme.title: A Haunting: Portal Of Doom
programme.desc: Anita Intenzo and her son, Chris, encounter the ghost of their recently deceased friend Paul while preparing his house to be sold. Paul warns of a demon attached to an artifact he acquired abroad. The demon invades Anita’s home and all hell breaks loose.

programme.title: A Haunting: Fear Feeders
programme.desc: Soon after Al Gonzalez purchases a home outside Fort Wayne, Indiana, he begins to hear strange noises and sees unexplainable shadows. Paranormal investigators determine the entities in Al's home are dangerous and that he is not their first victim.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: Veteran driver Jim attends an emergency call-out to recover a lorry that has broken down bang in the middle of a busy ring road. Motor racing fanatic Merrie has a hunch she may have landed her dream job when she attends a broken down lorry.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: Steve and the team find themselves in deep water when they attempt to recover a car that has crashed into a river. Jim is tasked with recovering a van that has become wedged on top of a garden wall.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: Steve battles rush hour traffic to manoeuvre his recovery vehicle around the narrow roads to get to a 7.5-tonne lorry out of a ditch, while Rory must deliver a dodgy van to a scrapyard for destruction.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15
programme.desc: Lantern's only female driver Merrie is tasked with the removal of an abandoned lorry, but it is soon clear this will not be a routine job. As she takes a closer look, she discovers that not only has the lorry been used as a mobile home, but that it is hou

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 16
programme.desc: Rory risks life and limb to recovered a skip lorry from the M1. Jim has a happy reunion with his own truck. Chris has to find a way of separating two HGVs that have somehow become wedged together.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 17
programme.desc: Jim faces mayhem on the motorway when a massive pile-up blocks the busy M1.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18
programme.desc: Marta and Pat have to pull a bin lorry out of a muddy ditch. But first they must battle their way through a thick wall of thorns.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19
programme.desc: Jim and Steve face one of their riskiest recoveries when a tanker carrying highly corrosive pure sulphuric acid smashes into the central reservation of a busy A road and overturns.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 20
programme.desc: It is all hands to the pumps at a bus depot in Tamworth, where Crouch's finest are joined by Lanterns' Merrie. Just days after Christmas the owners lost their school coaches to a devastating fire and need the wreckage removed.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: A smouldering, 44-tonne food lorry blocks an M1 slip road.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 2
programme.desc: A milk tanker needs rescuing from a boggy field.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: Steve goes into battle with a heavyweight transformer.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 4
programme.desc: Nick is tasked with finding a 4 x 4.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5
programme.desc: Tez rescues a 44 tonne artic from the side of the busy A1.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: Stig is reunited with a regular.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: Steve and his team must recover a 26 tonne lorry.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: Steve makes a grim discovery while trying to lift a truck.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: Tez and the team get in a jam.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: Rescuing a delivery truck from a pond, and a horsebox from a muddy field.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: A tipper truck has slid down a steep motorway embankment.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang and the kids finally arrive in Ba Sing Se to see the Earth King, only to find mysterious forces within the city conspiring to stop them.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: A series of short stories that explore the individual adventures of Katara and Toph, Uncle, Sokka, Aang, Zuko, and Momo.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: In this special episode, we go back in time to the moment Appa was stolen.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: While searching for Appa, the kids run into Jet but are torn about whether to trust him or not. Meanwhile, Zuko also hunts for Appa.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids battle Long Feng when they try to show the Earth King the conspiracy taking place in his city. Zuko becomes seriously ill and has odd dreams as he faces a spiritual crisis.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: A guru at the Eastern Air Temple helps Aang take the next step in his Avatar journey. Plus, Sokka meets his long-lost father, Azula hatches a diabolical plan, and Uncle and Zuko open a tea shop.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Everyone races against time to stop Azula's sinister conquest of Ba Sing Se. Zuko and Katara spend time together, while Aang's destiny hangs in the balance, as does Zuko's.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: After sustaining serious injuries, Aang awakens to find himself aboard a Fire Nation ship. Meanwhile, Zuko journeys home.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: To better camouflage themselves as real Fire Nation citizens, the kids check out a Fire Nation school. Also, Zuko confronts Uncle.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The gang arrive at a suffering Fire Nation fishing village, and a mysterious spirit appears to help the villagers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: Sokka feels that he is not contributing enough to the group, and searches for a mysterious master to teach him the ways of the sword.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Zuko, Azula, Mai, and Ty Lee go on vacation at Lo and Li's beach house, where they learn a lot about themselves and each other. Meanwhile, the kids face a new enemy.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: Aang and Zuko are taken on parallel adventures that give them insight into their forefathers' pasts, but how does the tale of Roku and Sozin matter to them now?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: When Toph discovers a quick way to make cash, Katara disapproves, and the rift between them has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: In a spooky village, Katara makes a special connection; the group investigate strange disappearances that occur during full moons.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: On the eve of the eclipse, Aang's worry overtakes him and his dreams become nightmares. Before long, he can't tell the difference between what's real and what's not.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: With the day of the eclipse upon them, the kids, along with a ragtag force of old friends, enact their long-planned invasion of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: As the invasion force fights their way to the Fire Nation capital, the kids help Aang find the Firelord in time for the eclipse, but after a few surprises.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the group seek refuge at the Western Air temple, they find someone they weren't expecting has been following them and hopes to join their group.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: As Zuko teaches Aang firebending, it turns out Aang isn't the only one who needs a lesson. The two set-out to learn the true meaning of Firebending from the original teachers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko head to the Fire Nation's most heavily guarded prison - the Boiling Rock - in hopes to find and break-out the captured invasion force.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko have to rethink their escape plan after things go wrong. They end up getting help from a few unexpected sources.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Katara sets out to confront the Fire Nation soldier who killed her mother. However, no one knows what she will do when she finds him.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: When the kids see a new play about themselves and all of their past adventures, they aren't happy with the production.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids learn new information about Firelord Ozai's master plan and decide to strike sooner than planned, but they are unsure if Aang is ready.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: While Firelord Ozai begins his master plan, the gang tries to stop him. Meanwhile, Aang seeks advice from his past lives.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Suki, Toph, and Sokka try to stop the Fire Lord's fleet before they hit land, while Azula prepares for her coronation day.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 21
programme.desc: Sokka and Toph manage to disable the airships while Zuko and Katara confront Azula. Aang finally faces off against the Fire Lord.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Katara and Sokka, a brother and sister from the Southern Water Tribe, discover a twelve-year-old boy frozen in an iceberg. Katara wonders if this boy is the Avatar whom the world has been awaiting.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Name That Toon
programme.desc: Krang threatens to vapourize the city by manipulating a Dematerializer, but a musical instrument that Howie, Irma's friend, plays around with, interferes with the device's programming.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Menace Maestro, Please
programme.desc: An invitation from April leads the Turtles, Irma and friend Howie to the haunted but renovated Floxy Music Hall, where the legendary Phantom of the Floxy resides.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Superhero for a Day
programme.desc: The half-shelled heroes find themselves competing with Bruce Bent, the Gadgetman, a self-proclaimed superhero from the past.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Back to the Egg
programme.desc: The foursome are dining out on their favourite food when Michelangelo and Leonardo are suddenly transformed into two five year-olds, thanks to Shredder's latest invention - an age-reversing serum.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Son of Return of the Fly II
programme.desc: After escaping from dimensional limbo, the Fly (alias Baxter Stockman) and his computer companion Z employ an experimental solid-energy generator to take over Channel Six.
programme.sub-title: Son of Return of the Fly II

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Knocks 'Em Dead!
programme.desc: House of Ha comedians are disappearing, right in the middle of their acts.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Bebop and Rocksteady Conquer the Universe
programme.desc: When Bebop and Rocksteady steal the Anxietron Ray, they use it to scare the dickens out of everyone in their path, including the Turtles.
programme.sub-title: Bebop and Rocksteady Conquer the Universe

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Meets His Match
programme.desc: Billionaire McDonald Crump makes the smallest pizzas in the world, and gives the biggest parties.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Slash - The Evil Turtles from Dimension X
programme.desc: Using some of Shredder's and Krang's supercharged mutagen, Bebop and Rocksteady turn pet turtle Slash into an evil super mutant.
programme.sub-title: Slash - The Evil Turtles from Dimension X

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Lightens Up
programme.desc: Tired of constant nagging about discipline, Raphael, Michelangelo and Donatello use a Personality Modifier on Leonardo to get him to lighten up.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Were-Rats of Channel Six
programme.desc: Finding a canister of unstable mutagen, the Rat King turns April and Vernon of Channel Six News into giant were-rats. As the transformed newshounds terrorize the city, Bebop and Rocksteady arrive to collect some explosives for Shredder and Krang.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Funny-They Shrunk Michelangelo
programme.desc: Talbot Breech is short, fussy and the insane inventor of a shrinking ray. His hobby is to miniaturize the biggest ships afloat; only today, he's caught Michelangelo in his diabolical ray.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Big Zipp Attack!
programme.desc: Intent on stealing the Lofty Tower's rigidium spire, Shredder lets a dreaded Zipp loose on the city as a tactical diversion.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello Makes Time
programme.desc: Donatello's newest invention, the Time Stopper, has fallen into the hands of unconventional scientist Lloyd Cycloyd.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Farewell, Lotus Blossom
programme.desc: Using a devious deception, Shredder tricks Lotus Blossom into fighting the Turtles for possession of the burial urn of Chakahachi, an ancient Japanese magician.

programme.title: Rebel Without a Fin
programme.desc: In a dark plot to rule the world, Dr. Polidorius has created a man-fish using an evolution accelerator.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rhino-Man
programme.desc: When multi-billionaire J. Gordon Hungerdunger sponsors a superhero competition, the city goes crazy with good guys.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Bugman
programme.desc: Meet Bugman: he's Michelangelo's favourite comic book mutant superhero of all time. And today, he's real and in trouble.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Poor Little Rich Turtle
programme.desc: Desperate for the formula to Shellhammer Chemical's super rocket fuel, Krang and Shredder send Rocksteady and Bebop to kidnap poor little rich brat Buffy Shellhammer.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): What's Michelangelo Good For?
programme.desc: Dr. Lesseau is stealing animals from the city zoo to use for experiments.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Dimension X Story
programme.desc: April and Vernon of Channel Six News each need a big story, and Shredder's challenge to the Turtles of a fight to the finish sounds like just the ticket.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Degree
programme.desc: To pick up a correspondence course degree addressed to "Miss Donna Tello," Donatello talks Irma into playing genius-for-a-day.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Cufflink Caper
programme.desc: When Shredder hires gonzo gangster Big Louie to find the explosive Cufflinks of Cathay, the Turtles go undercover with the mob to get to the bottom of the plot. Gunfights galore lead to a final shootout at the taffy factory at high midnight.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Versus Tempestra
programme.desc: Tempestra's Revenge, the toughest game in video arcade, has got Leonardo hooked. Just as he's finally about to beat the machine, lightening strikes, and an electrical overload brings the wicked Tempestra to life.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Splinter Vanishes!
programme.desc: First Master Splinter vanishes, leaving behind instructions that the Ninja Turtles must now disband and go their separate ways.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Drives Em' Wild
programme.desc: Raphael's brain inadvertently gets switched with that of Oscar the cab driver.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Beyond the Donatello Nebula
programme.desc: Donatello's efforts to contact life in the Turtle Nebula succeed only too well: he accidently transports a space-traveling lizard named Algy down to Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Bug Blunder
programme.desc: After Bebop and Rocksteady ruin an experimental batch of mutagen, Krang discovers that this new goo grows giant-sized insects. Shredder immediately sends some of the humongous bugs to Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Foot Soldiers are Revolting
programme.desc: Desperate for decent henchmen, Shredder decides to make some minions he can rely on, and uses Krang's brain wave enhancer on a robotic foot soldier.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Unidentified Flying Leonardo
programme.desc: Investigating reports of UFOs in the country town of High Falls, April uncovers a real scheme.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Turtles and the Hare
programme.desc: In Krang's latest scheme, Rocksteady and Bebop, dressed as Easter bunnies, are blasting people with a Docilizer Ray and turning them into timid, rabbit-like people.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Once Upon a Time Machine
programme.desc: Hokum Hare discovers that Shredder has a time train to travel to the future, where he can become crimelord of a crime-free era.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Mondo Gecko
programme.desc: Michelangelo is turtle-napped by mutant lizard Mondo Gecko, who was mutated at the same time and place as the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: Mutagen Man
programme.desc: Krang plans to use a large rocket's vapour trail to rain mutagen over the city when nerdy delivery boy Seymour Guts falls into Shredder's mutagen vat.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Badd Time
programme.desc: Hillybilly crooks Bedelia Badd and sons Bufrod and Bubbaheist the Turtles new improved van, using it to steal the diamond in Dr. Kepple's Powercizer, which drains the city's power and could destroy it.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Bugman - Again!
programme.desc: The Swatter threatens to destroy the city with a stolen swarm of super termites unless the Turtles meet him atop The Entire State Building.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Muckman Messes Up!
programme.desc: Krang sends Shredder, Rocksteady and Bebop after new mutagen Compound X-7, which Krang thinks will un-mutate Turtles. At lab, garbagemen are doused with the stuff and change into mutants Muckman and Joe Eyeball, blaming Turtles.

programme.title: Riptide: If You Can't Beat 'Em, Join 'Em
programme.desc: The Riptide Detective Agency is hired to consult for a new detective television show. The lead actors follow the guys around for over a week while investigating an actual case.

programme.title: Riptide: Echoes
programme.desc: While in a firefight, one of the guys is shot, and the others deal with the repercussions of what had to be done.

programme.title: Riptide: Pilot
programme.desc: Nick Ryder and Cody Allen leave their former employment, taking tourists on trips by helicopter or by boat, and start their own private detective agency.

programme.title: Riptide: Conflict Of Interest
programme.desc: A girl whom Cody dated. runs away from her husband and goes to the boat looking for him. But they're not there but Murray is and he offers to help her.

programme.title: Riptide: Somebody's Killing The Great Geeks Of America
programme.desc: An attempt is made on Natalie Kramer's life and her associates in the so-called brain trust group have already been assasinated.
programme.sub-title: Somebody's Killing The Great Geeks Of America

programme.title: Riptide: Hatchet Job
programme.desc: Although happy at first that a client found their way to their detective agency, the boys quickly discover she's an escapee from a mental institution.

programme.title: Riptide: The Mean Green Love Machine
programme.desc: A girl from Mama Jo's crew is afraid something has happened to her father and the Riptide Agency goes to Mexico to find out in what kind of trouble he's in.

programme.title: Riptide: Diamonds Are For Never
programme.desc: While in the theater watching Bambi, Murray encounters an upset woman. It turns out she just witnessed the killing of a good friend of hers who turns out to be a diamond smuggler.

programme.title: Riptide: The Hardcase
programme.desc: A young woman spurned is a suspect in a murder.

programme.title: Riptide: Four-Eyes
programme.desc: The boys are hired by a guy to keep tabs on his wife. It seems he wants to divorce her and he wants ammo to avoid giving her alimony.

programme.title: Riptide: #1 With A Bullet
programme.desc: When a music star is killed in a car accident and the equally famous passenger gets injured, the Riptide agency gets hired by his fanclub to deliver flowers to his hospital bed.

programme.title: Riptide: Long Distance Daddy
programme.desc: Nick's sponsor child comes from Cambodia to the USA so his sister can undergo heart surgery.

programme.title: Riptide: Double Your Pleasure
programme.desc: Cody's flirt with a pretty girl sends the boys on a search for her apparently missing sister. Her ties to a mobster make them a target for him and his goons.

programme.title: Riptide: Raiders Of The Lost Sub
programme.desc: Well educated, but just as goofy, Murray's sister shows up unexpectedly, and persuades the boys to look for a sunken WW2 German submarine.

programme.title: Riptide: Something Fishy
programme.desc: Boz and Nick both fall for the same beautiful dolphin-trainer, whose charges become implicated as accomplices in a drug-smuggling scheme.

programme.title: Riptide: Where The Girls Are
programme.desc: The Riptide trio is tasked with protecting three high maintenance women from kidnappers during their California vacation.

programme.title: Riptide: The Orange Grove
programme.desc: An army general they befriended in Vietnam, is suspected of dealing cocaine, and the boys are pressured by the FBI to Lure him out.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: Appa worries about Umma after a minor household accident. Janet uses Jung's past to boost her reputation with students. A high school reunion has Kimchee thinking about an old flame.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Field of Schemes
programme.desc: Appa's reputation as an impartial umpire faces a stiff test. Jung and Kimchee disagree about discipline. Janet worries a sweater may be haunted.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Who's Pranking Who?
programme.desc: Kimchee's plan to impress the higher-ups backfires. Shannon inadvertently insults Umma's cooking. Appa and Janet enter a prank war.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Matchy Matchy
programme.desc: Umma tries to set up Janet with their new mason. Shannon encourages Jung to give Appa a gift. Kimchee and Shannon work on employee evaluations.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Hugs & Prayers
programme.desc: Janet and Appa take a first aid course. Umma worries her prayers cause more harm than good. Shannon and Jung discuss their relationship.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Friends and Family
programme.desc: Jung gives Appa and Umma a business presentation for the store. Shannon and Kimchee's office teasing leads to a meaningful discovery for Kimchee.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Gay Discount
programme.desc: Mr. Kim offers a gay discount at the store, while Mrs. Kim tries to find Janet a cool, Christian, Korean boyfriend.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Goes To Prison
programme.desc: In an effort to make some fast money before March break, Gerry takes a side job teaching in a prison.

programme.title: Mr. D: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Gerry steps into the role of a lifetime and finds himself bitten by the acting bug and reveling in the newfound attention.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Throws The Game
programme.desc: Gerry takes on the senior girls’ volleyball team. But when he realizes their semifinals will be interfering with his all-important social schedule, he sets out to sabotage them at the quarterfinals.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Man With Two Red Shoes
programme.desc: When Gerry learns of a lurker near the school, he sets out to catch said lurker and earn the Teacher of the Month title.
programme.sub-title: The Man With Two Red Shoes

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Has Hot Sub Anxiety
programme.desc: Gerry is blown away by the hotness of the new substitute teachers and sets his sights on ‘hot-sub Mary,’ the new love of his life.

programme.title: Mr. D: Busplotation
programme.desc: When Gerry hears that a Kickstarter campaign raised a bundle of money for a bullied bus monitor, he sets out to victimize himself in a similar fashion. Meanwhile, Bobbi comes to a surprising realization and Dwyer has a ‘killer’ new girlfriend.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Charters A New Course
programme.desc: When Gerry isn’t given a full-time contract for next year, he makes a bold move that may change the course of his career.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Wants to Make Phys Ed Great Again
programme.desc: After finally achieving his goal of teaching physical education full time, Gerry sets out to teach the course the way it should be taught.
programme.sub-title: Gerry Wants to Make Phys Ed Great Again

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Rigs PTA
programme.desc: Lisa runs for the unopposed Parent-Teacher Association president position as a way to punish the staff.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Cuts a Footloose
programme.desc: When Gerry meets a DJ at the gym, he offers her a job at the school dance, but Robert has banned dances and won't budge on his position.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Coaches Hockey
programme.desc: Gerry suspects Central High of cheating; Bobbi prepares for maternity leave.

programme.title: Mr. D: Formative Bullshit
programme.desc: Gerry discovers that teaching phys ed comes up a lot of paperwork; Bobbi tries to juggle work and a newborn; Lisa becomes friends with some moms who may have dirt on Xavier.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Pay to Play
programme.desc: Gerry is in a compromising situation after the teacher auction; Emma enlists Dwyer to do repairs in the library; Trudy gets a surprise visit.

programme.title: Mr. D: Work to Rule
programme.desc: Gerry is in awe of the concept of work-to-rule; Lisa tries setting boundaries with her stepson; Nisha accidentally reveals too much to her students.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Wants What He Can’t Trans
programme.desc: Gerry takes control of the girls' soccer team to get back at Coach Meyers; an ambitious mom seduces Frank; Lisa's reign of terror seemingly comes to an end.
programme.sub-title: Gerry Wants What He Can’t Trans

programme.title: Mr. D: Principal for a Day
programme.desc: Gerry's least-favorite student becomes Principal for a Day; a harmless prank goes sour; Bobbi accidentally ruins a student's life.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry’s Security Insecurity
programme.desc: Robert hires a security guard after a string of thefts; Robert learns the truth behind his baby's name.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry’s Insider’s Look
programme.desc: A team of reporters uses Xavier Academy to determine the true value of private schools and ends up exposing a deep, dark secret.

programme.title: Mr. D: Big in Japan
programme.desc: After the exposé on Gerry costs him his job , he heads to Japan to start a new life, leaving Xavier behind.

programme.title: Mr. D: “Finnished” Teaching
programme.desc: Gerry’s officially introduced as Xavier’s new principal and the staff’s visible disappointment leads Gerry to try and gain their trust by making some drastic moves he thinks everyone can appreciate.

programme.title: Mr. D: Breaking Slime
programme.desc: Slime is all the rage across Xavier, leading Gerry to ban it.

programme.title: Mr. D: Mister ‘D’
programme.desc: Gerry’s approached by a producer who wants to use Xavier as a backdrop for a movie, but he gets too caught up in the details to see the big picture.

programme.title: Mr. D: Security Threat
programme.desc: When Gerry’s almost injured in a staffroom incident, he’s disappointed to realize the staff’s indifference over his near-death experience.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Dwyer Way
programme.desc: When Gerry realizes how poorly he’s been taking care of himself, he adopts Dwyer’s strict diet.

programme.title: Mr. D: A Wedding Story
programme.desc: Bobbi and Robert’s big day is fast approaching and, tired of being alone, Gerry desperately wants his own partner. His search takes him online, but doesn’t exactly translate to love.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Pussy on the Chainwax
programme.desc: Some friends argue over whether a new slang phrase is a "thing," a man learns the truth about his father's Hollywood past, and the valets come to Anne Hathaway's defense.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Alien Imposters
programme.desc: The survivors of an alien invasion find out whom they can trust, a drill sergeant sings an unconventional marching song, and a pop sensation answers questions from her fans.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Little Homie
programme.desc: A parole officer uses a puppet to connect with convicts, a Nazi officer tells the story of the time he saw Hitler, and Levi goes steampunk.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Georgina and Esther and Satan
programme.desc: Two pious old women describe the awful things they want to do to Satan, Keegan and Jordan misunderstand each other's texts, and a club DJ gets a little too real.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Slap-Ass: In Recovery
programme.desc: Raffi returns to the locker room, Reginald VelJohnson becomes furious about the state of Family Matters, and a mobster ruins an important peace talk.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Quarterback Concussion
programme.desc: The Rhinos' quarterback takes a hit, a Macedonian cafe owner berates his customers, and a man suspects his wife of cheating on him with a dog.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Scariest Movie Ever
programme.desc: A detective confronts a serial killer in a funhouse, a blind man identifies a body, and a representative from the Make-A-Wish Foundation encounters an evil child.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: In Plain View
programme.desc: When a police informant is found murdered, 15 Division sets its sights on finding a weak link in the notoriously brutal East Jameson gang. Andy has to work closely with Detective Jo Rosati, a woman who seems far too interested in Andy’s fiancé, Luke.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: When a woman gets brutally attacked in the same manner as deceased rookie cop Zoe Martinelli. Det. Luke Callaghan is convinced that it’s the same suspect.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Monster
programme.desc: After a seemingly drunken man collapses in the barn, 15 Division is put under quarantine. Andy and Swarek work together to find the accomplice of a dyed blue bank robber

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Dov and Gail work together under Swarek’s expert tutelage in a stake-out operation to stop an Asian gang from killing a snitch.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: 15 Division’s hunt for an armed robber leads them to the scene of a horrible car accident. While Andy deals with a woman pinned in her car, the other officers must track and apprehend the fugitive

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Little Faith
programme.desc: When Traci and Andy are sent out on an undercover training exercise, they stumble upon a young woman who is about to die of an overdose. Meanwhile, Dov finds himself on a “ride-along” with a drug dealer and old friend of his deceased brother

programme.title: Rookie Blue: On The Double
programme.desc: When Gail Peck’s uniform is stolen, the rookies go after a vigilante who is impersonating a police officer. Meanwhile, Swarek’s off the grid, trying to get information out of former crime enforcer Jamie Brennan

programme.title: Rookie Blue: God’s Good Grace
programme.desc: While Swarek is brutally interrogated by Jamie Brennan in the basement of a Pickering farmhouse, the rookies help Andy solve a mystery that may reveal Swarek’s location

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fresh Paint
programme.desc: Andy McNally’s first shift on the job turns into mayhem when shots are fired in a downtown rooming house. In the midst of the chaos, Andy triumphantly makes her first big arrest

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Mercury Retrograde
programme.desc: As the other rookies hunt down a dangerous escaped convict, Swarek drags Andy through his undercover hauntson a mission he won’t explain. At first, Andy assumes Swarek is a rogue cop trying to settle scores from his undercover days.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Table Stakes
programme.desc: The team arrives at a charity fundraiser being held at the house of Portia Richmond, an ex-show girl who became very successful, where a body is found floating in the swimming pool.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Two Tough To Die
programme.desc: A Jane Doe is brutally attacked and raped before being left to die on the side of the road. With two bullets lodged in her brain, she is in a deep coma.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Face Lift
programme.desc: A thief is found dead from blunt force trauma to his head in a pottery store where he was evidently trying to crack a safe. The team dusts the store and finds the fingerprint of a girl who has been missing for the last 20 years.

programme.title: Law & Order: American Dream
programme.desc: A skeleton unearthed at a building site resurrects one of Stone's old cases.

programme.title: Law & Order: Born Bad
programme.desc: The defence of a teenages hinges on the claim that his violemce stems from genetics.

programme.title: Law & Order: The Pursuit of Happiness
programme.desc: A Russian bride is suspected of murdering her rich husband to stay in America.

programme.title: Geordie Shore

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: It's the squad's last days on the piste. Aaron is on the pull with wingman Gaz, it's pure awks between Abbie and Sarah over Scotty T, and things get worse when he tries it on with Zahida. (S14, ep9)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: The Squad head back to the toon and give the newbies their most brutal initiation yet! Zahida and Scotty get closer but will they be able to keep it a secret? Boss Anna has some big news. (S14, ep10)

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Dating My Car/ Baby Powder Addict
programme.desc: Nathaniel has been in a relationship with his car for nearly five years, taking it out on dates, buying it gifts, and even getting intimate with it. Jaye has been addicted to snorting baby powder.
programme.sub-title: Dating My Car/ Baby Powder Addict

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Airline Addict_Crazy for Capybaras
programme.desc: Anthony has been collecting aviation memorabilia since he was 5. Melanie is crazy about her pet capybara, Gari, taking him for walks and teaching him tricks.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Buggin' Out_Dumpster Diet
programme.desc: Bugs have been a part of David’s daily diet for over twelve years, watch as he braces himself to eat his most venomous bug yet. Kelly’s daily diet consists of food solely gathered from the dumpster.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Addicted to Inflatables/Butt Injection Addict
programme.desc: Mark has been addicted to his 15 inflatable pool toys, eating with them, sleeping with them and even bathing them. Karmello has been getting black market butt injections for the last three years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Identical Twin Obsession / Eats Mattresses
programme.desc: Twins Amy and Becky are addicted to being identical, looking alike, acting alike, and even weighing their meals to stay the same size. Jennifer is addicted to eating mattresses.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Ventriloquist/Cat Lady
programme.desc: April's addiction to her puppets has gotten so strong she can't go anywhere without them. Debbie is severely allergic to cats, but has over twenty of them, leaving her in isolation.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Married to a Doll/Picking My Scabs
programme.desc: Davecat has been married to his synthetic wife for 10 years. Meanwhile, Rachael hopes that her compulsive scab picking will stop by her wedding day.
programme.sub-title: Married to a Doll/Picking My Scabs

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Troll Takeover_Stuffing Animals
programme.desc: The Smith family has a collection of 213 stuffed and mounted animals throughout their home. Michelle’s obsession with trolls threatens her relationship with her family.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Toilet Paper/Blow Dryer
programme.desc: Lori has been sleeping with her blow dryer for 20 years, despite the risk burns or fire. Meanwhile, Kesha's family is concerned that eating half a roll of toilet paper a day is causing health issues.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: 42 year old Mark Hughes is a heart attack waiting to happen. His continuous consumption of greasy mountains of foodhas left him 11 stone overweight at 22 stone 3lbs.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: It’s a highly emotional week in the feeding clinic as fat and sugar junkie 29 year old Danni Brooke from Lincolnshire swaps diets with 21 year old Superskinny food phobicVicki Smith from Glasgow.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: This week it’s atale of twoAmy’s in the feeding clinic as Supersize Amy Green who tips the scales at a staggering 20 stone 8lbs swaps diets with Superskinny Amy Walsh who only weighs 7 stone 10.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Last year superskinny Gillian and supersize Phillipa entered the feeding clinic to help each other unlock their dysfunctional relationship with food. How are getting on?

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Dr Christian Jessen and Anna Richardson return for a second run of the diet magazine show which tackles the nation’s relationship with food.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Jade weighs just five and half stone, and is desperate to regain her pre-pregnancy size for the sake of her young son. Julie, binges on huge platefuls of home cooked food.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: 22 year old mum and part time call centre worker Heather is desperate to curb her enormous appetite. 19 year old Charlotte's dream is to be worshipped for being beautiful.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: On tonight’s emotional show we revisit 4 people from last series who were in the grip of the life threatening eating disorder, anorexia.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Phillipa is a 48 year old ‘foodie’ from Sheffield who just can’t say no. Gillian is a 24 year old student nurse from Inverness and single mum of two.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Long and lanky, 22-year-old Alex Law from Stockport hits the scales at just over ten stone because he barely eats a meal. Tired and exhausted he lives on a diet of caffeine pills supplemented.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Football fan Wayne works as a Customer Services Advisor. He is desperate to lose weight so he can play his favourite sport. Martin is a 32 year works as a photographer, PR manager and model.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: SHARK!
programme.desc: A woman's pregnancy is a shock to her husband, and veers toward tragedy as eclampsia threatens her life and the life of their child; a man overwhelms his kidneys by over-consuming beer; a patient is brought to the ER with a live shark clamped onto his leg

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: LEARNING PAINS
programme.desc: A knifing victim suddenly starts seizing, and his doctors can't treat him until they figure out the cause; an ER physician is on a date at a restaurant when she is thrown into an emergency situation to save a dying child.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Long Live The King
programme.desc: Doctors are baffled when a retired admiral is brought in and they don't understand what is making him grow weaker by the day.

programme.title: PRIDEtv
programme.desc: PRIDEtv is the lifestyle television channel for the LGBTQI+ community, open-minded, featuring award-winning arthouse films, captivating documentaries, popular queer series, short films, reality shows, and original TV shows. Your Pride starts here!

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Smart Investment
programme.desc: An amazing beachfront property is what Inez's couple is looking for & these top million dollar agents are sure to surpass their expectations.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Bucket List
programme.desc: Mike's friend invites him to an Indian wedding & tells him about his uncle who is looking for a luxury condo close to the airport. Daryl, Inez, & Jin support & donate to Mike's charity.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Right Choice
programme.desc: Somewhere to spend the rest of their days surrounded by nature sounds like a paradise to retire in. Daryl & Jin play some golf to discuss a potential listing she has found & Mike aids Inez in purchasing a new vehicle.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Big City Home
programme.desc: A young trendy couple wants to start a family in Toronto but they need some help from these top million dollar agents. Jin is a natural daredevil & has always wanted to skydive with her clients.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: City Dreams
programme.desc: Moving in together can be stressful but fun because you are starting a new life together! Inez's client is selling their separate properties & looking for a house or condo.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Cottage Getaways
programme.desc: Agreeing on a vacation home is made much harder when these top million dollar agents have astounding listings. Mike's client is looking for a waterfront cottage.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Perfect Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Remarrying is hard enough let alone combining two families under one roof. With a total of 4 children between the ages of 7 & 16 Jin's client is definitely going to need lots of space & land in a safe neighborhood.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: Now that Kristen & Kane have opened an office in Toronto, they will be travelling a lot from Vancouver & want somewhere of their own to stay in.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Classic Homes Are Timeless
programme.desc: Many people enjoy staying busy & always having a project on the go. Inez's client loves to build & create breathtaking properties. On their next project, this couple wants an interesting property.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Agents of Million Dollar Homes
programme.desc: Deborah & Vezi are an international couple that want to live in Toronto for one year but has no idea where to start looking. Luckily for them Mike, Jin, Daryl, & Inez have teamed up to find them the home of their dreams.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Glass House (Part 1)
programme.desc: The King is back, baby! Daryl King is known to make an entrance, and he wants the houses he shows to have that same "wow" factor. His clients are looking for a grand mansion

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Glass House (Part 2)
programme.desc: Will Daryl be able to dazzle his clients and find a property that will take their breath away?

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Palace Fit for a Princess (Part 1)
programme.desc: International luxury realtor Mike Donia jets off to Thailand to work with a client and good friend of his, Mae. She is moving back to her hometown of Bangkok to pursue her modeling career, and is looking for the house of her dreams.
programme.sub-title: A Palace Fit for a Princess (Part 1)

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: With the help of a Bangkok real estate expert, Max Gloeckner, Mike is confident he can deliver just what Mae is looking for. This episode features the last two of four properties.
programme.sub-title: A Palace Fit for a Princess (Part 2)

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Infinite View (Part 1)
programme.desc: Vicky is searching for a home in The Beaches for her and her family. No one knows the Beach like Inez Kudryk, so Vicky enlists her help in finding some stunning luxury properties to tour.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Infinite View (Part 2)
programme.desc: Will Vicky find the forever home of her dreams? This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase and special appearances by guest agent Jasmine Xuereb.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sunset on the Patio (Part 1)
programme.desc: Steve Bailey to save the day! This week's episode features the lovely couple Chris and Rosa as they search for the perfect home.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sunset on the Patio (Part 2)
programme.desc: Unfortunately for Rosa, she isn't seeing the benefits of moving to a town around Cambridge. Steve's got some neat ideas, but will they be able to convince Rosa? This episode features the last two of four properties.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sweet Home Belize (Part 1)
programme.desc: Sofie Kehdi heads to the island of Ambergris Caye, Belize to help a friend and former client, actress and choreographer Zuzana Marosová. As a public figure, Zuzana craves privacy in her personal time and is looking for a relaxing space.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sweet Home Belize (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the help of local realtor Daniel Hartin, Sofie sets her sights on the perfect home...and hopefully a bit of fun in the sun! This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the client decides to purchase.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Nice Family Home (Part 1)
programme.desc: Jessica and Mark are a young couple living and working in Thailand after meeting there several years ago and falling in love. They are looking for a permanent home in Bangkok, and after chatting with her friend Mae.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Nice Family Home (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the help of local agents Max Gloeckner and Nala Gill, will Mike be able to find a place that suits the whole family? This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Clever Income (Part 1)
programme.desc: After helping them find a home last season, Inez is enlisted by Martin and Cheryl to help them find the perfect investment property. While Cheryl wants a property with minimal work and no landlord responsibilities.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Clever Income (Part 2)
programme.desc: This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase, with special guest appearances by interior design expert Shelley Alexanian and guest agent Mo Loulou.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Open Concept (Part 1)
programme.desc: This week's episode features Cambridge realtor extraordinaire Steve Bailey as he helps couple Dan and Melinda search for the perfect home. It's a real battle of contemporary vs. traditional as Dan and Melinda.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Open Concept (Part 2)
programme.desc: This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase, with a special guest appearance by interior design expert Shelley Alexanian.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Big Investment (Part 1)
programme.desc: Vancouver-based couple Jim and Shannon are looking to relocate to their hometown of Toronto with their two daughters. With a budget of 10 million dollars, they enlist the help of savvy realtor Sofie Kehdi.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Big Investment (Part 2)
programme.desc: This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase, with a special appearance by guest agent Tyrone N. Steer.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Magical Home (Part 1)
programme.desc: Off on another adventure! This episode takes Mike Donia on a whirlwind tour of Southeast Asia as he searches for a home for his clients, Antonio and Kim. Featuring properties in Thailand.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Magical Home (Part 2)
programme.desc: Off on another adventure! This episode takes Mike Donia on a whirlwind tour of Southeast Asia as he searches for a home for his clients, Antonio and Kim. Featuring properties in Thailand.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Income for a Rainy Day (Part 1)
programme.desc: Vezi and Deborah love the house they purchased last season in Stouffville, but they are ready to make the move to the big city. They enlist the help of Inez Kudryk to show them the best properties she can find in Toronto.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Income for a Rainy Day (Part 2)
programme.desc: Vezi and Deborah love the house they purchased last season in Stouffville, but they are ready to make the move to the big city. They enlist the help of Inez Kudryk to show them the best properties she can find in Toronto.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Tricky Choice (Part 1)
programme.desc: Laura and Steven are a young couple with an expanding family, and are ready to take the next steps in home ownership. They want a large plot of land for their young children to run around and enjoy nature.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Tricky Choice (Part 2)
programme.desc: Laura and Steven are a young couple with an expanding family, and are ready to take the next steps in home ownership. They want a large plot of land for their young children to run around and enjoy nature.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: We Bought a Resort (Part 1)
programme.desc: Sofie Kehdi heads back to Belize to help husband and wife team Rachel and Ben size up some resort properties. Along with their investors, Rachel and Ben are looking to purchase a resort on the island of Ambergris Caye.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: We Bought a Resort (Part 2)
programme.desc: Sofie Kehdi heads back to Belize to help husband and wife team Rachel and Ben size up some resort properties. Along with their investors, Rachel and Ben are looking to purchase a resort on the island of Ambergris Caye.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Net Zero
programme.desc: Julie and James are looking for a new home to raise their two boys. James is in the tech industry and would love an energy efficient home.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Manic Monday
programme.desc: A wanted man attempts to hide at his grandmother's house, police arrest a suspect driving a stolen vehicle, and officers call animal control for an injured dog.

programme.title: COPS: Nightvision
programme.desc: A man on a late-night bike ride is stopped by officers for not having a headlamp. A suspect in a domestic dispute admits to hitting a woman.

programme.title: COPS: Up for Sainthood
programme.desc: Officers pursue two juveniles involved in a carjacking. Two men sitting in a truck are spotted hiding something in the console. A man claims he took drug paraphernalia from kids as a good samaritan.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Mom Still Loves You
programme.desc: Officers track down a suspect who eluded them earlier, a suspicious vehicle takes off at the sight of police, and a man gets busted for possession in front of his mom.

programme.title: COPS: Bumper Cars
programme.desc: A man rams his wife's car into his daughter's car. Deputies find a rifle in a suspect's car that was in a prior altercation. A man claims to run a travel business after cops find evidence of id theft.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Mommy's Tears
programme.desc: A suspect collides with another driver while fleeing from police, deputies mediate an altercation over a bag of chips, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS: Cops No Helmet, No Ride
programme.desc: A man resisting arrest draws a crowd, an armed robbery suspect takes a walk down felony lane with an officer he recognizes, and a strange scene unfolds at a DUI checkpoint.

programme.title: COPS: First Do No Harm
programme.desc: A suicidal man tries to taunt police into shooting him. Undercover officers bust up an illegal operation at a pain management clinic. A woman claims she's just a bystander to a motorcycle hit and run.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Bond, Terry Bond
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will be testing the effectiveness of driving a vehicle with fully automatic machine guns mounted to the car!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Just-Terry-Fied
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will be test 2 scenes from Justified where, Terry finds himself in a bathtub and a dead body lying over top of him.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry's Reindeer Game
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a scene from Reindeer Games when Ben Affleck and Charlize Theron get trapped under a frozen lake.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Ex-Men: The Origin of Terry
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a famous scene from X-men. They are attempting to see if you can split a bullet with a Katana sword.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Pay Terry Back
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test 2 scenes from Mel Gibson’s film Payback. Mel's character is in the back of a taxi when 4 bad guys pull up next to him in an SUV.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Paint Your Red River Stagecoach at High Noon
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will test different famous shots from westerns. Can you shoot a cowboy hat off the bad guy?
programme.sub-title: Paint Your Red River Stagecoach at High Noon

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry’s Underworld
programme.desc: Terry and Larry are going to test a famous scene from Underworld with Kate Beckensale.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: A Pirate’s Life for Terry
programme.desc: Terry and Larry go on a swashbuckling adventure when they test two scenes from the 1920’s film, The Black Pirate starring Douglas Fairbanks, Senior.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Loves 70’s Cop Shows
programme.desc: Terry travels back in time to the 70’s where he gets to relive his childhood dreams of becoming a 70’s TV cop.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Breaking Terry Badly
programme.desc: Terry falls victim to Walter White in Breaking Bad, and Terry and Larry test 3 separate scenes from this iconic series.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Getting to Know Rick O'Shea
programme.desc: In this episode we get know Larry’s friend Rick O’Shea (Ricochet).

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Larry's Shadow
programme.desc: Larry gets sucked into Terry’s dark and mysterious world because Terry wants to test 2 scenes from the 1994 film with Alec Baldwin, The Shadow.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: We Hear Ya
programme.desc: Larry and Terry test several requests from viewers.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: D-Day By Air
programme.desc: Terry goes back to paratrooper school and will see how difficult it was for soldiers engaging the enemy while parachuting down to safety on D-Day.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Saving Private Terry
programme.desc: Terry gets to relive part of his military carrier by attempting the famous sniper shot from Saving Private Ryan.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: The Last Crusade of Indiana Terry
programme.desc: Terry channels his inner Dr. Jones and tests 1 scene from Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade containing 3 different tests.
programme.sub-title: The Last Crusade of Indiana Terry

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Equalizing Terry
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will test 3 scenes from Denzel Washington’s Equalizer films. Can Terry be as cool as Denzel?

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Silencing Terry
programme.desc: Terry wants to demonstrate how Hollywood has used different objects to silence a gunshot.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Meet the Smiths
programme.desc: Terry finally gets to compare himself to Brad Pitt!! Terry and Larry test 3 scenes from action film Mr. and Mrs. Smith.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Nightmare on Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: Terry and Larry get to test several scenes from Horror films!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: All for One!
programme.desc: Terry travels back in time to see if he can make it as a Three Musketeer! Can he throw his sword and kill the enemy?

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: RED-ish
programme.desc: Terry takes himself out of “retirement” to test some scenes from RED that will be extremely dangerous.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: McSchappert
programme.desc: What can Terry do with just a paperclip? Probably nothing, but Larry and Terry will test several scenes from MacGyver.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry's Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: Terry and Larry tackle the epic Lethal Weapon series testing 4 different scenes.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Jean Claude Van Schappert
programme.desc: Terry enters the world of Slow-Mo and explosions trying to imitate Jean Claude in Hart Target.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: S-Mart
programme.desc: Give me some sugar baby! Terry travels through time where he will test the cult favorite, Army of Darkness.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry's Brave Heart
programme.desc: Terry gets to annoy Larry with his impersonation of William Wallace from Braveheart.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Bond-ing with Larry
programme.desc: Who is the greatest international action hero of all time, Terry Schappert?

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Across the Great Divided Lonesome Mighty River
programme.desc: Everybody loves a great western! Except Larry. Terry gets Larry to test more scenes from classic western movies!
programme.sub-title: Across the Great Divided Lonesome Mighty River

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Down Mexico Way
programme.desc: Don't mess with organized crime. The dynamic duo tackle scenes from the Mexico cartel series Queen of the South.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Alone at Home
programme.desc: Who left Terry Home Alone! Larry did. Terry and Larry test several scenes from the classic film series Home Alone.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Loves Superheros
programme.desc: Holy Hollywood Weapons! Terry and Larry put some of your favorite Superhero’s to the test. Tune in to the same Bat Outdoor Channel for the results!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Reacher
programme.desc: We’re putting Jack Reacher to the test! The movie, the series, and the pie!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: The Harder Terry Falls
programme.desc: Dust off your chaps as Terry tests several things from the epic western The Harder They Fall, and a canteen buster test from Gunsmoke!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: The Schappert Identity
programme.desc: Terry channels his inner Jason Bourne to test some of the best moments from the series of films.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Leftovers Again?
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test things they never got to from other episodes. Pull up a chair and get ready for leftovers, and a surprise guest!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Punishing Larry
programme.desc: Grenades, propane tanks, and a bathtub, all adds up to some big tests of the popular comic book character.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Loves Action Movies
programme.desc: From Polar, to James Bond, to Lethal Weapon, Terry loves action movies and is putting some of the best ones to the test!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Reacher
programme.desc: We’re putting Jack Reacher to the test! The movie, the series, and the pie!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: The Harder Terry Falls
programme.desc: Dust off your chaps as Terry tests several things from the epic western The Harder They Fall, and a canteen buster test from Gunsmoke!
